OSR Digital is one of the largest digital and physical (CD, VCD, DVD) movie distribution companies in Nepal. The channel primarily focuses on entertaining its viewers with new Nepali movies, encompassing various genres such as action, comedy, romance, horror, drama, etc.

All the videos on this channel are uploaded with full digital copyrights either owned by OSR Digital or officially provided by different content owners. If there are any copyright issues with the uploaded videos, please feel free to contact us to resolve the matter and avoid conflicts.

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk 🧟‍♀️

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards 👻

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister’s wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos—until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace’s centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Faara Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani
Story by: Aakash Kaushik
Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar
Music: Pritam
Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair
Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Line Producers: Suresh Balaji & George Pius
Costume Designers: V Sai Babu, Dhanya Balakrishnan, Veera Kapur, Rimple & Harpreet
Sound Designers: Rajakrishnan & Shahaab Alam
Background Score: Ronnie Raphael
DI: Sri Sarathi Studios
DI Colorist: Vishnuvardhan
VFX: WRC Studio LLP
VFX Supervisor: Sidharth Priyadarshan
Production Designer: Sabu Cyril
Director of Choreography: Pony Verma, Ganesh Acharya
Group Commercial Head (BTL): Hamavvand Chwda
Head of Marketing (BTL): Raveena S Deshpaande
Post Production Head (BTL): Manohar Pandya
VP Licensing and Syndication (BTL): Ankit Chauhan
Commercial Head (BTL): Mitesh Bilakhia
Executive Producer: Pooja Tiwari Angarish
Publicity Designer: House of Awe
Media Consultant: Spice
Digital Agency: Everymedia
Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX

Nepal Hiphop Records Presents the official music video of Kali Kali by ST MAN featuring Yung 22 & Big Norzza.
Kali Kali is a fusion of a Hindi chorus, Nepali folk melodies, and new school rap.


Audio Credits :

Lai bari Lai 
Maya cha hai dil bhari nai 
Banai khayo dadelo le 
Manai Khayo timro maya le

Timro mana samma jane bato Dekhaideuna hai 
Maya Tarki farki jharki bhayeni Boli deuna hai

Khelna Deu 
Herna Deu 
Salkeko jawani Fakreko Maya maa Palkeko ma pani 
Cha maya cha katai 
Sirfula Siraima Laidium ki chhapakai

Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon

Mutu Dhak Dhak BP high Body maa Heat 
Chinta Nagara ma Gardimla thik
ausadhi lekhdya chu 7 din ko 
Khop lagai dinchu 7 inch ko

Bihana ki diuso ki Rat dina paryo 
Dina maa 5 ki 7 ki 8 Dina paryo 
Vana Body ko kun Part jach dina paryo

Khoya Khoya Rehta Hoon 
Tere Yadon Mein Baithe X2


Janti boki aula 10 gate bihibar 
Gaubhari masu ra bhat 
Kodo Ko Raksi chyang Nigar Bidi cigar
K khane K piune afno bichar

Meri Sakambari timlai samhali  rakchu rakam sari
Ful chari diula timro harek kadam pachi

9 mahina maa ghorle paune kam gardinchu
5 biga garib lai daan garidinchu

fulai lw Sajaidiula

snippet.title: Rama | Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana | Nitesh Tiwari | Ranbir, Yash, Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
snippet.description:
Rama is the greatest of all time because he lived a life where the choices he made were always in the benefit of the greater good, duty over desire, and sacrifice over self. 

His legacy continues to enhance and empower humanity over time and bring the belief in the goodness of the human spirit to resolve all conflict and bring peace to the world. 

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana 
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari 

In cinemas worldwide
Ramayana Part 1 🏹
Diwali 2026

---------------------------------------------------

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana
Our Truth. Our History.

Starring: 
Ranbir Kapoor as Rama 
Yash as Ravana 
Sai Pallavi as Sita 
Ravie Dubey as Lakshman

The thePJ is a web channel intended to promote cinema through films review, interviews, discussions, video essays and analytical compilations. It is intended primarily for the purpose of encouraging informed discussions, criticism and review of cinema and towards such purpose the programs use short extracts of cinematograph films, sounds recording and photographic works. These clips and extracts are of a minimal nature and the use is not intended to interfere in any manner with their commercial exploitation of the compete work by the owners of the copyright. The use of works are in compliance with the fair dealing exception provided under Sec. 52 of the Copyright Act, and we asset our use of the works under the exception provided for criticism and review.

snippet.title: Gehra Hua - Lyrical (Full Version) | Dhurandhar, Ranveer Singh, Sara A,Shashwat Sachdev,Arijit Singh
snippet.description:
Dive into the full depth of emotions with lyrics that bring every feeling to life.

Jio Studios Presents
A B62 Studios Production

DHURANDHAR

A Shashwat Sachdev Musical

Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Sarangi: Momin Khan 
Backing vocals: Nikitha Venkatesh, Divya S Iyer, Shudi Ramani, Srishhti Bhitrikothiy

Mixed and mastered by: Akash Shravan

Lyrics:
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Tu agar meri ye ujaale tere 
Tu agar meri dil hawaale tere 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Dariya dua 
Gehra hua 
Tera hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Palke jhapakta hai aasma 
Laakhon farishton ki hai tu jaan 
Wo poochte hain rehti kahan 
Meri baahon mein rehti unko bataa 
Palke jhapakta hai aasma 
Usne bhi tujhsa dekha kahan 
Hai raunakein wahan tu hai jahan 
Meri baahon mein rehna yehi hai dua 
Tu agar meri hai fasaana tera 
Tu agar meri toh zamaana tera 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahaan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Tera hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Ma Re 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Re Sa 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Ma Re 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Re Sa 
Teri mohabbat mein jalna bhi hai 
Aur tujhse bachke hi chalna bhi hai 
Kuch rang apna badalna bhi hai 
Maine dhalna tere rang mein hai sadaa 
Tu chaand hai ik dhadakta hua 
Chori se mujhko hi takta hua 
Seene se lagke chamakta hua 
Meri jannat ka rasta 
Tu hi toh hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahaan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Dariya dua

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla Trailer REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Bhooth Bangla Trailer Review By Deeksha Sharma. Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa Directed by Priyadarshan in Bhooth Bangla Movie In Cinemas 16 Apr is set for Comedy with Horror Twist competing with Bhool Bhulaiyaa Kartik Aaryan Franchise & Manjulika Nostalgia competition. Bhooth Bangla Trailer hits hard on the spot with Fun Humour & dark Storytelling with lot of surprises, Trailer Reaction & full Movie Expectation would be shared in this Video. Can Akshay Kumar crack Box Office with Bhooth Bangla- Do leave Comments below.

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji First Look  Hindi Teaser | Riteish D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
For the land that forged warriors. 
For the faith that never wavered. 
For the dream of Swarajya that lived in every heart… 
With deep reverence to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj,  we proudly unveil the first look teaser of Raja Shivaji — India’s Greatest Warrior King. 👑 
 Our King. Our Pride. Our Legacy. 🚩 
 Directed by Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh. 
#RajaShivaji In cinemas on 1st May 2026 in Marathi, Hindi & Telugu.

Jio Studios Presents
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Directed by: Riteish Deshmukh
Produced by: Jyoti Deshpande & Genelia Deshmukh
Music: Ajay-Atul 
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (Asc, Isc)
Story screenplay: Ajit wadekar, Sandeep Patil, Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Dialogue writer: Prajakt Deshmukh
Additional Hindi dialogues: Jaideep Yadav
Editor: Urvashi Saxena
Background Score: John Stewart Eduri
Production designer: Nikhil Kovale, Apurva Bhagat, Shashank Tere
Associate Producer: Nandita Sachdev
Executive Producer: Sandeep Patil
Casting Director: Rohan Mapuskar
Sound Designer: Kunal & Parikshit
Primary Costume Designer: Rushi Sharma & Manoshi Nath
Secondary Costume Designer: Pournima Aak
Additional Wardrobe / Styling: Nafs [Rizwan Shaikh & Deeksha Sharma Khan]
Action Director: Dawid Szatarski & Manohar Verma
Choreographer: Remo D’souza
Hair-Makeup Designer: Audrey Sangma, Nitin Indulkar, Hakim Aalim & Kanta Motwani
Chief Assistant Director: Charul Patil
Director’s Assistant: Chandni Kargathra
Research Consultant: Ketan Puri
VFX Supervisor: Pushpendra Dubey & Swapnil Ambre
CG & VFX: Assemblage Entertainment
Di Studio: Prime Focus Limited
Di Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar
Sound Mixing
Post Producer: Takshit Pradhan
Re-recording mixer:
   
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of one of India’s Greatest Warrior King – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi, Hindi, and Telugu.
 
1st May 2026
In Cinemas
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: "Malai Hera" Sabin Rai & The Pharaoh
snippet.description:
“Malai Hera” is a gentle love song where a single glance holds a thousand unspoken feelings and hearts speak in silence.

Sabin Rai & The Pharaoh are:

Sabin Rai 
Binod Lama Tamang
Jeevan Lama
John Shrestha

Audio engineers
Stephen Tamang
Subash Gurung

Crew 
Jitesh Shakya
Nara Bahadur Khatri
Samir Shrestha

Mix and Master by Stephen tamang
Recording Studio : Fuzz_studio_nepal.
Keyboard sessions: Anup sunar ( Rahar music Creations )
Back vocals : Anup sunara, Aashis Rokka.

Video credit :

VIDEO DIRECTOR : ABHI SAMPANG RAI
CAST: NEELAM RAI. AKASH SUHANG LIMBU. AAYUS RAI
DOP: BIKESH MAGAR. ASSIST DIR: ARSHU SHRESTHA. CINEMATOGRAPHY: KIWA KHIMDUNG RAI.
ART DIRECTION: ONGDI MOKTAN. MUA/STYLIST: BOMI RAI. SAMASTI RAI. PROJECT MANAGER: AADI PAHARI.

EDIT: BIKESH MAGAR. SANTOSH SHAH THAKURI. coLor: BIKESH MAGAR.

snippet.title: Khesari Lal New Song | Roti Garam | Namrita Malla | Shilpi Raj | New Bhojpuri Song | Bhojpuri Gana
snippet.description:
“रोटी गरम” में खेसारी लाल यादव, नम्रिता मल्ला और शिल्पी राज का धमाका छा गइल बा, फुल मस्ती और डांस के साथ अभी देखीं 🚀

Subscribe to our channel for more Bhojpuri Songs:
https://youtube.com/c/SaregamaHumBhojpuri

Audio Credits:
Singers: Khesari Lal Yadav & Shilpi Raj
Music Director: Ajay Singh AJ
Lyrics: Abhishek Babu Yadav (ABY)
Additional Vocal - Vipul Pandey , Gangesh Raja , Ajay Singh Aj

Video Credits:
Featuring: Khesari Lal Yadav & Namrita Malla
Video Design & Directed: Sooraj Katoch
DOP: Rahul Yadav
Choreographer: Shoki & Lokesh
Video Edit: Srikanth (ZAV Studio)
AD: Geeta Tamta (Zenith)
Costumes: Reema Katoch (Zai Fashions)
Dancers: Zenith Dance Troupe
Production: Rohit Seth (Zenith)
Associate: Alex
Asst.: Prince Yadav
Focus Puller: Anish
Makeup: Aryan Rajesh
Hair: Sonu
BTS: Chetan, Pujan (ZAV Studio)
Colourist: Govindpuria

Lyrics: 

कोरस:-
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली 
 म्यूजिक ...
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली शर्मीली रंगीली नशीली कटीली छबीली आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल 
हे हे हे ...

Chorus :-
 खुल के बतावअ गोरी कुछ ना छुपावअ गोरी 
सईया ने का का छुवा     ......आ
करअ तारु चोरा चोरी कइसे भइल जोरा जोरी
रतिया में का का हुआ .......    आ

Mukhda: - 
Male  :-
पहिला राती के बतिया बतावअ
बाटे किरिया तु कुछ ना छुपावअ -२

female -
होठवा के होठवा से देहिया के देहिया से 
रुई जैसा नरम किया 
सईया  मोरा सईया मोरा सईया 
नाही सरम किया  
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया 
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया

Male: -
निर्दईया  निर्दईया निर्दईया तोहार बावे  पिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया ..

Female :-
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया ..


Antra: -1
chorus: -
धक धक का धक धक का धक धक जिया करे
जब आके मौका पाके उ कोरा भरे ...

Male: -
कइसे के नैना चार भइल 
कइसे शुरु राते प्यार भइल
कांचे कसइली रहल बदनिया 
कइसे फुला के अनार भइल

Female: -
अँखिया से अँखिया लड़ल रहे 
दिल में बेचैनी बढ़ल रहे 
चुम्मा लेवे में हाय रामा ढाढी गढ़ल रहे  -२
बलमा मोरा बलमा मोरा बलमा बेशरम पिया
जला के जोबन पे ...

Antra: -2
Chorus: -
क ख ग घ पढ़लू ह का 
नाईट फलाइट पे चढ़लू ह का 

Male: -
धीरे धीरे कइसे सीन भइल 
मामला कब रंगीन भइल 
रसगुल्ला जइसन मीठ मीठ  देहिया
कइसे ए  गोरी नमकीन भइल 

Female  :-
कनवा के बाली टूट गईल
होठवा के लाली छुट गईल
फुलवा के डाली पाके भवरा लूट गईल -२
(हम अनाड़ी )
उई मा उई मा उई मा नाही मरम दिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा...

#rotigaram
#khesarilalyadav 
#namritamalla 
#shilpiraj 
#mungda 
#newbhojpurisong 
#newbhojpurigana 

Learn to sing in Sur with AI Powered Personal Music Teacher- Padhanisa by Saregama. Download Padhanisa App now; https://sarega.ma/padhanisa

Follow us on:
Facebook: https://bit.ly/3FxwPgo 
Instagram: https://bit.ly/32rkJqM
X: https://x.com/saregamaglobal

Label:: Saregama India Limited, A RPSG Group Company

snippet.title: Patriot Hindi Trailer | Mammootty | Mohanlal | Mahesh Narayanan | Anto Joseph | 1st May
snippet.description:
From Anto Joseph Productions, the banner behind some of the most acclaimed and celebrated films in recent times, and visionary filmmaker Mahesh Narayanan, comes the official trailer of Patriot.
Featuring an ensemble of legends: Mammootty, Mohanlal, Fahadh Faasil, Kunchacko Boban, Nayanthara, and Revathy.

North India Release by PEN MARUDHAR CINE ENTERTAINMENT

Written & Directed by: Mahesh Narayanan
Produced by: Anto Joseph, K. G. Anil Kumar
Co-Produced by: C. R. Saleem, Subhash George Manuel
Music & Original Score: Sushin Shyam
Director of Photography: Manush Nandan ISC
Executive Producers: C. V. Sarathi, Rajesh Krishna
Edited by: Mahesh Narayanan, Rahul Radhakrishnan
Production Design: Shajie Naduvil, Jibin Jacob
Audiography: Vishnu Govind
Sync Sound: Vaisakh P. V.
Production Controller: Dixon Poduthas
Line Producers:
Sunil Singh, Niroop Pinto, Justin Boban, Jeswin Boban
Makeup: Ranjith Ambady
Lyrics: Anwar Ali, Vinayak Sasikumar
Action Directors:
Dhilip Subbarayan, Stunt Silva, Mafia Sasi, Riyaz - Habib, Mahesh Mathew
Costume Design: Dhanya Balakrishnan
Choreography: Shobi Paulraj
VFX:
Firefly, Eggwhite, Ident VFX Lab, Phantom FX, Binary Circus, Pictorial FX
Chief Associate Director: Linu Antony
Associate Director: Phantom Praveen
DI Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar ISC
Stills: Navin Murali
Publicity Design: Aesthetic Kunjamma
PRO: Vaisakh C. Vadakkeveedu, Jinu Anilkumar
Digital PR : Vishnu Sugathan
Trailer Cuts: Arju Benn

Music Label - T-Series

#JaiyeSajana 

Lyrics:
Pattalan chon digde hanjoo
Akh meri phir vi roi na
Pattalan chon digde hanjoo
Akh meri phir vi roi na
Aisi preet la lai rabba
Jaisi hor kade hoi na

Tere jaan ton main baad
Ik din soi na
Poora shehar begana
Ethe mera koi na
Phir preet kise de naal
Kade hoi na
Zamana zaalIm taan vi roi na

Saare rang vekh lae
Hun koi dar nahi
Jiundi rahun aashiki
Eh kade na marni
Chaahe turdi ravan
Milna ve kidhre ni
Koi na ethe dil diyan dassda

Saanu saariyan visar gaiyan raahvan ve
Kede paase jaiye sajana

This is the last video we've planned to release from GhaamChhaya Intimate. I hope you liked what we did and we plan on doing more of these soon. We'll be releasing music videos from the album following this. 

This is me and the band performing “Kasari”  

Stream GhaamChhaya on all streaming platforms now 

Keys / Vocals — Yabesh Thapa
Female BV — Oshin Karki
Male BV / AC Guitar — John Tamang
Drums — Stifler
Bass — Av Kc
Electric Guitar — Roshan Lama
Sarangi — Kiran Maharjan
Flute — Shrijan Maharjan
Cello — Iva Maharjan
Violin — Pheobe Shrestha
Audio Engineer — Neerab Shrestha

Mixed / Mastered — Kobid Bazra

Special thanks to Ruslan Studio and Jade Studio for supporting us.

Stay connected:
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/

#ghaamchhaya

snippet.title: Dhanyabad Nepali | Badhai Badhai yo deshlai badhai | Dedicated song to Balen & Government | Official
snippet.description:
Aagyat Presents: New Nepali Song 

|| Dhanyabad Nepali | Badhai Badhai Yo Desh Lai Badhai | Balen Song ||

#aagyat #newsong #nepalisong #aagyat #balenshah  #balen  #nepalisong  #newnepalisong  #nepalimusicvideo  
#nepalilovesongs  #nepalisadsongs  #balennews   #NepaliFilmSong 
#nepaliaudiostory  #NepaliVideo #NepaliTrending #NepaliHitSong 
#OfficialSong #OfficialVideo #lovestorysong  #dhanyabad   #EmotionalSong 
#nepalilokgeet  #nepalimodernsong  #nepalimusic  #nepaliviralsong #dhanyabadnepali 
----------------------------------------

Lyrics:

Saath diyeko ma Nepali aamaalai…
Dhanyabaad cha… Nepali janata lai…

Jaya Mahakaali
Jaya Nepal
Saath diyeko ma Nepali aama lai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janata lai

Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen!
Purano sab bye bye, aba khel naya
Congress UML Maoist? sabai lai nai nai
Janata ko awaj uthyo sadak dekhi sansad
Aba janata jagyo, sakiyo purano natak
Rabi dai, Balen high high
Janata ko mutuma naya lahar cha bhai
Naya cha party, naya cha sarkar
Aba janata le paaunchha aafno adhikar
“Adhikar!”

“Naya sarkar!”

Gut chaina, loot chaina, aba phut chaina
Desh banaune jimma timilai chhut chaina
Puranaka  para le dukh paaye Sara le
Wakk ra dikk janata timra thotra nara le

Saath diyeko ma Nepali ama lai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janataalai

Balen! Balen! Balen!

Naya banos desh, naya paribesh
Bhrashtachar hatos, nahos kunai case
Karnali ka janata aba niras hunu pardaina
Sitomol ko aasma aba bachnu pardaina

“Aba pardaina…”
Himal, pahad, tarai eutai awaj
Bikash ko baato aba khuldai cha aaj
Bichauliya dalal le khaana napawos
Sahid ko ragat kahilyai jana napaos
Sambidhaan sanshodhan? yadi chahinchha bhane gar
Tara janata ko maang puraa garne jimma tero bhar
Saath diyeko ma Nepali aama lai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janataalai
Saath diyeko ma…
Dhanyabaad cha… Nepalai


Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen!
Yo desh haamro…
Yo maato haamro…
Aba haamile banaune ho…

“Banaune ho…”

Badhai badhai yo deshlaai badhai
Dui tihai ko Balen sarkarlaai badhai
Janata ko jit ho, yo kunai khel hoina
Aba paribartan aayo, yo sapana hoina
Hath ma shakti, saathma janata
Aba kasaile rokna sakdaina yo yaatra
Itihaas lekhdai cha naya pustale
Nepal uthdai cha aafnai hastaksharle
Saath diyeko ma Nepali aamaalai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janataalai

Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen!!!

Dhanyabaad cha… Nepali janataalai…
---------------------------------------
♪ ♪♪ Audio Credits:- 
Song:- 
♬ Dhanyabad Nepali धन्यबाद नेपाली

♬ Vocal:-
Aagyat

♬ Lyrics: 
Ramesh Luitel
Sujan Koirala 

©️ Aagyat, 2026
---------------------------------------------
Social Links: 
YouTube: https://tinyurl.com/AagyatYT

Unauthorized downloading and uploading on any streaming platform is Strictly Prohibited & will attract punitive measures from Aagyat. Embedding to a website is allowed.

“Adhikar!”

“Naya sarkar!”

Gut chaina, loot chaina, aba phut chaina
Desh banaune jimma timilai chhut chaina
Puranaka  para le dukh paaye Sara le
Wakk ra dikk janata timra thotra nara le

Saath diyeko ma Nepali ama lai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janataalai

Balen! Balen! Balen!

Naya banos desh, naya paribesh
Bhrashtachar hatos, nahos kunai case
Karnali ka janata aba niras hunu pardaina
Sitomol ko aasma aba bachnu pardaina

“Aba pardaina…”
Himal, pahad, tarai eutai awaj
Bikash ko baato aba khuldai cha aaj
Bichauliya dalal le khaana napawos
Sahid ko ragat kahilyai jana napaos
Sambidhaan sanshodhan? yadi chahinchha bhane gar
Tara janata ko maang puraa garne jimma tero bhar
Saath diyeko ma Nepali aama lai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janataalai
Saath diyeko ma…
Dhanyabaad cha… Nepalai


Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen!
Yo desh haamro…
Yo maato haamro…
Aba haamile banaune ho…

“Banaune ho…”

Badhai badhai yo deshlaai badhai
Dui tihai ko Balen sarkarlaai badhai
Janata ko jit ho, yo kunai khel hoina
Aba paribartan aayo, yo sapana hoina
Hath ma shakti, saathma janata
Aba kasaile rokna sakdaina yo yaatra
Itihaas lekhdai cha naya pustale
Nepal uthdai cha aafnai hastaksharle
Saath diyeko ma Nepali aamaalai
Dhanyabaad cha sabai Nepali janataalai

Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen! Balen!!!

Dhanyabaad cha… Nepali janataalai…
---------------------------------------

Song:- 
♬ Dhanyabad Nepali धन्यबाद नेपाली

♬ Vocal:-
Aagyat

♬ Lyrics: 
Ramesh Luitel
Sujan Koirala

BIKASH THAPA
GAJUREL THAQURI

--------------------------------------------

Lyrics :-

बियरको सिसि आयो कमल बिसि 
बियरको सिसि आयो कमल बिसि 

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

घर त मेरो यहाँ हैन बाँके बर्दिया 
तिम्रो रुपले ए कान्छि दिलै चोर्दिया

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

माईला दाई हजुर, केछ केटा हो हल्लिचल्ली
ठिक छ दाई, दामी दामी दामी 
कता हो हामी ?

बर्दियामा हो दाई कता जानू खै 
पाँच बर्ष लभ परेको गर्लफ्रेन्ड पोइल गै 
हाहाहा ... हाहाहा..
मान्छे बौलाएसी कस्को के लाग्छ र खै 

भेट्न आउछु भन्थी मलाई कोहलपुरको चोकमा 
एक कार्टुन रक्सी खाएँ मैले रिसको झोकमा 

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

कता कता - यता यता 
कता कता - यता यता 

तिम्रै सौराई लाग्यापछी तिमलाई भेट्न मन लाग्यो झ्याम्म झ्याम्म 
तिम्रै सौराई लाग्यापछी तिमलाई भेट्न मन लाग्यो झ्याम्म झ्याम्म

Beerko CC aayo kamal bc
Beerko CC aayo kamal bc

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Gharta mero yaha hoina banke Bardiya 
Timro ruple e kanxi dilai chordiya

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Maila dai hajur kexa keTa ho hallichalli
Thik xa dai dami dami dami 
Kata ho hami 
Bardiyama ho dai kata janu khai

5 Barsa love pareko girlfriend poila gai
Haha haha haha 
Manxe baulayasi kasko k lagxa ra khai

Vetna aauxu vanthi malai Kohalpurko chok ma
1 kartun raksi khaya maile risko jhokma

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Kata kata- yata yata 
Kata kata - yata yata 

Timrai saurai lagyapaxi timlai vetna man lagyo jhyamma jhyamma

Banjaare - Bairan

🎤  Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne

Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

Haan-aan

Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne

snippet.title: Powfu, beabadoobee - death bed (coffee for your head) (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🎧 Powfu, beabadoobee - death bed (coffee for your head) (Lyrics)
🔔 Subscribe & turn on notifications to stay on the Pulse
⬇️ Stream/Download: https://Powfu.lnk.to/ListenID

Follow Powfu
https://www.instagram.com/pow.fu
https://www.facebook.com/PowfuOfficial
https://www.tiktok.com/@pow.fu

📄 Lyrics: Powfu, beabadoobee - death bed (coffee for your head)

Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Yeah, I don't wanna fall asleep, I don't wanna pass away
I been thinking of our future 'cause I'll never see those days
I don't know why this has happened, but I probably deserve it
I tried to do my best, but you know that I'm not perfect
I been praying for forgiveness, you've been praying for my health
When I leave this earth, hopin' you'll find someone else
'Cause yeah, we still young, there's so much we haven't done
Getting married, start a family, watch your husband with his son
I wish it could be me, but I won't make it out this bed
I hope I go to heaven so I see you once again
My life was kinda short, but I got so many blessings
Happy you were mine, it sucks that it's all ending
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed (Yeah, aye)
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed (Aye, yeah)
I'm happy that you here with me, I'm sorry if I tear up
When me and you were younger, you would always make me cheer up
Taking goofy videos and walking through the park
You would jump into my arms every time you heard a bark
Cuddle in your sheets, sing me sound asleep
And sneak out through your kitchen at exactly 1:03
Sundays, went to church, on Mondays, watched a movie
Soon, you'll be alone, sorry that you have to lose me
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

#Powfu #beabadoobee #deathbed #lyrics #lyricvideo #karaoke #pulse #pulsepop

snippet.description:
👑 Lauv - I Like Me Better (Lyrics)
🎶 Listen on Spotify: http://bit.ly/4c1YIwO
🔥 Help us reach 100,000 subscribers!
🔔 Turn on notifications to stay updated with new uploads!

📱 Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nearsidehq

×=×=×=×=×  

Lyrics for "Lauv - I Like Me Better"

[Verse 1]
To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee, burning through the hours talking
Damn

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

[Verse 2]
I don't know what it is but I got that feeling
Waking up in this bed next to you swear the room, yeah, it got no ceiling
If we lay, let the day just pass us by
I might get to too much talking, I might have to tell you something
Damn

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

[Bridge]
Stay awhile, stay awhile
Stay here with me
Stay awhile, stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile, stay awhile
Stay here with me

A deeply emotional song that reflects the pain, love, and longing of a wife whose husband is far away in a foreign land. Pardeshma Mero Swami beautifully captures the reality of distance, sacrifice, and unbreakable connection of hearts.

snippet.title: Jab Talak (First Look) Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika | Pritam, Arijit Singh, Amitabh, Akasa | Cocktail 2
snippet.description:
WARNING ⚠️
This summer just got HOTTER🔥

#JabTalak first look out now

#DanceLikeNoOnesWatching #Cocktail2Song #MaddockFilms 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎧 Song Credits 

➟ Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna
➟ Music : Universal Music India and Mad For Mussic 
➟ Singer : Arijit Singh, Akasa
➟ Composer: Pritam Chakraborty
➟ Lyrics : Amitabh Bhattacharya 

Dinesh Vijan & Luv Ranjan presents #Cocktail2​, releasing in cinemas on 19th June, 2026

A Maddock Films & Luv Films Production

🎬 Video Credits

➟ Cast: Shahid Kapoor,  Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna 
➟ Directed By: Homi Adajania 
➟ Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan & Ankur Garg
➟ Written By: Tarun Jain & Luv Ranjan
➟ Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja

➟ Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
➟ Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
➟ Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
➟ Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
➟ Publicity Design: Himanshu  & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lyrics:

MUKHDA 
(मैं नाचूँ तब तलक
तू बोले जब तलक) ×4

है थोड़ा बेसुरा
पर दिल में ताल है
इसको हम नाचने से
टोकें(bindi)  कब तलक

(मैं नाचूँ तब तलक
तू बोले जब तलक) ×4

नच्चाँ(bindi)  आज मैं शुकर मना के
सोणे यार तों(bindi)  नज़रें मिला के
मैनू लोड़ किसे दी कोई ना
सारे जग दी लाज भुला के

चल mood बना के सूफ़ी
थोड़ी कर लें(bindi)  बेवकूफ़ी
चूल्हे में जाये मितरा
दुनिया भर की मसरूफ़ी

पैरों को पर लगने से रोकें(bindi)  कब तलक

(मैं नाचूँ तब तलक
तू बोले जब तलक) ×4


ANTARA

वे रान्झा आग है जितनी इधर लगी
तू भी मान ले दुगनी उधर लगी

दोनों दिल ही बराबर झुलस गये 
फेर.. जाण दे कितनी किधर लगी
(Not phir but Pher)

अज यार दे करके सदक़े(nukhta)
मैंने प्याले प्याले गटके
चल देखें(bindi)  दिल पटरी से
आख़िर(nukhta)  कब तक ना भटके

देंगे भी दूजे को धोखे कब तलक..

(मैं नाचूँ तब तलक
तू बोले तब तलक) ×2

बहकी जवानियाँ जैसे बारूद हैं(bindi)
देखें(bindi)  उठते नहीं हैं(bindi)
शोले कब तलक

(मैं नाचूँ तब तलक
तू बोले तब तलक) ×2

© 2026 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd., Under Exclusive License from Mad for Mussic

snippet.title: Arijit Singh - Zaalima | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Love Song
snippet.description:
Song - Zaalima
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

snippet.title: The Last Letter (Lyrics) - Maan Panu
snippet.description:
#TheLastLetter #MaanPanu

The Last Letter (Lyrics) - Maan Panu

Song Name: The Last Letter
Lyrics: Maan Panu
Music Producer: Mazaak
Composed by: Maan Panu
Recording Engineer: Samir Dharap at Input One
Mixed & Mastered by: Hanish Taneja at Studio Alika

Lyrics:

Ek baat reh gayi thi
Chup chaap reh gayi thi
Tum sham subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Bas yaad reh gayi thi
Be hisaab reh gayi thi
Tum saare mausam le gaye
Barsaat reh gayi thi

Ek baat reh gayi thi
Chup chaap reh gayi thi
Tum sham subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Tune na jaana tere jaane se kya kya hua
Kitni kahani bani kitna tamasha hua
Jaane tu kaisi hogi aur voh deewana tera
Khush tu bhi kya hi hogi aur kya salona jahan

Mera sara badan tha so raha
Bas aankh reh gayi thi
Aisa lag raha tha mar gaye
Bas saans reh gayi thi

Tum phool chura ke chal diye
Bas shaakh reh gayi thi
Tum shama bujha ke chal diye
Bas raakh reh gayi thi

Ek baat reh gayi thi
Chup chaap reh gayi thi
Tum sham subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Bas yaad reh gayi thi
Be hisaab reh gayi thi
Tum saare mausam le gaye
Barsaat reh gayi thi

Mere haathon ki laqeerein likh di uss khuda ne
Bas tera naam reh gaya
Mere haathon ki laqeerein likh di uss khuda ne
Bas tera naam reh gaya
Bas tera naam reh gaya
Bas tera naam reh gaya

#MaanPanu #TheLastLetter

Mera sara badan tha so raha
Bas aankh reh gayi thi
Aisa lag raha tha mar gaye
Bas saans reh gayi thi

Tum phool chura ke chal diye
Bas shaakh reh gayi thi
Tum shama bujha ke chal diye
Bas raakh reh gayi thi

Ek baat reh gayi thi
Chup chaap reh gayi thi
Tum sham subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Bas yaad reh gayi thi
Be hisaab reh gayi thi
Tum saare mausam le gaye
Barsaat reh gayi thi

Mere haathon ki laqeerein likh di uss khuda ne
Bas tera naam reh gaya
Mere haathon ki laqeerein likh di uss khuda ne
Bas tera naam reh gaya
Bas tera naam reh gaya
Bas tera naam reh gaya

#MaanPanu #TheLastLetter

Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Hum jab se hain judaa
Ae mere hum nasheen
Yun dekho to mere
Daaman mein kya nahin
Daulat ka chaand hai
Shohrat ki chaandni
Magar tumhe khoke
Lage hai mujhe aisa
Ke tum nahin to kuch bhi nahin
Tum kya jaano ab hum kitna
Dil hi dil mein pachtaate hai
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Voh din the kya haseen
Dono the saath mein
Aur baahein aap ki thi
Mere haath mein
Tum hi tum hai sanam
Mere din raat mein
Par itni bulandi pe
Tum ho meri jaan
Aaye na daaman ab haath mein
Paana tumko mumkin hi nahin
Soche bhi to hum ghabraate hai
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain.

snippet.title: Roblox Would You Rather, MEME EDITION..
snippet.description:
Today I played would you rather, MEME EDITION. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

ar.description:
لعبتُ اليوم لعبة "هل تُفضّل" بنسخة الميمز. شاهدوا الفيديو كاملاً لتعرفوا ماذا سيحدث.

متجر المنتجات: https://foltyn.shop/

انضموا إلى هذه القناة للحصول على مزايا حصرية:

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--حسابات التواصل الاجتماعي--

ديسكورد: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

مجموعة روبلوكس: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

اسم روبلوكس: TheRealFoltyn

إنستغرام: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

تويتر: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

ما هو روبلوكس؟ روبلوكس عبارة عن منصة ألعاب افتراضية تفاعلية، حيث يمكن للأطفال من جميع الأعمار التفاعل بأمان، والإبداع، والاستمتاع، والتعلم. ما يميز ROBLOX هو أن كل شيء تقريبًا فيه مصمم ومُنشأ من قِبل أعضاء المجتمع. صُمم ROBLOX للفئة العمرية من 13 إلى 18 عامًا، ولكنه متاح للجميع. يبدأ كل لاعب باختيار شخصية افتراضية وتحديد هويتها. بعد ذلك، يمكنه استكشاف عالم ROBLOX والتفاعل مع الآخرين من خلال الدردشة أو لعب الألعاب أو التعاون في مشاريع إبداعية. يُمنح كل لاعب أيضًا قطعة أرض افتراضية غير مطورة، بالإضافة إلى مجموعة أدوات افتراضية لتصميم وبناء أي شيء، سواء كان ناطحة سحاب قابلة للاستكشاف، أو طائرة هليكوبتر عاملة، أو آلة بينبول عملاقة، أو لعبة "الاستيلاء على العلم" متعددة اللاعبين، أو أي ابتكار آخر لم يخطر على بال أحد. هذه القطعة الأولى من الأرض الافتراضية مجانية. من خلال المشاركة وبناء أشياء رائعة، يمكن لأعضاء ROBLOX ربح شارات مميزة، بالإضافة إلى عملة ROBLOX (Robux). وبدورهم، يمكنهم التسوق من المتجر الإلكتروني لشراء ملابس وإكسسوارات لشخصياتهم الافتراضية، بالإضافة إلى مواد بناء مميزة، ومكونات تفاعلية، وآليات عاملة.

#روبلوكس دفولتين

fr-FR.title: Roblox Préférez-vous, édition MEME...
fr-FR.description:
Aujourd'hui, j'ai joué à « Tu préfères… » version MEME ! Regardez la vidéo en entier pour découvrir la suite.

Boutique : https://foltyn.shop/

Rejoignez cette chaîne pour accéder à des avantages :

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Réseaux sociaux--

Discord : https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Groupe Roblox : https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Nom Roblox : TheRealFoltyn

Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter : https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Qu'est-ce que Roblox ? Roblox est un univers virtuel en ligne où les enfants de tous âges peuvent interagir, créer, s'amuser et apprendre en toute sécurité. ROBLOX est unique en son genre : presque tout y est conçu et construit par les membres de la communauté. Conçu pour les 13-18 ans, ROBLOX est cependant ouvert à tous. Chaque joueur commence par choisir un avatar et lui donner une identité. Il peut ensuite explorer ROBLOX et interagir avec les autres en discutant, en jouant ou en collaborant sur des projets créatifs. Chaque joueur reçoit également son propre terrain virtuel non aménagé, ainsi qu'une boîte à outils virtuelle pour concevoir et construire tout ce qu'il souhaite : un gratte-ciel navigable, un hélicoptère fonctionnel, un flipper géant, un jeu multijoueur de « Capture du drapeau » ou toute autre création encore inimaginée. Ce premier terrain virtuel est gratuit. En participant et en créant des choses originales, les membres de ROBLOX peuvent gagner des badges spéciaux et des ROBLOX dollars (« Robux »). Ils peuvent ensuite utiliser ces Robux pour acheter des vêtements et des accessoires pour leur avatar, ainsi que des matériaux de construction premium, des composants interactifs et des mécanismes fonctionnels.

#Roblox #foltyn

ru.title: Roblox: Что бы ты предпочёл? (Мемная версия)
ru.description:
Сегодня я играл в игру «Что бы ты предпочёл?», версия с мемами. Обязательно посмотрите всё видео, чтобы узнать, что произойдёт.

Мерч: https://foltyn.shop/

Присоединяйтесь к этому каналу, чтобы получить доступ к бонусам:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Социальные сети--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Группа Roblox: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Имя в Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Что такое Roblox? ROBLOX — это онлайн-виртуальная игровая площадка и мастерская, где дети всех возрастов могут безопасно общаться, творить, развлекаться и учиться. Его уникальность заключается в том, что практически всё в ROBLOX создаётся и разрабатывается членами сообщества. ROBLOX предназначен для подростков от 13 до 18 лет, но открыт для людей всех возрастов. Каждый игрок начинает с выбора аватара и присвоения ему имени. Затем он может исследовать ROBLOX — взаимодействовать с другими, общаясь в чате, играя в игры или сотрудничая над творческими проектами. Каждому игроку также предоставляется собственный участок необработанной виртуальной земли вместе с виртуальным набором инструментов, с помощью которого можно проектировать и строить что угодно — будь то небоскрёб, по которому можно перемещаться, работающий вертолёт, гигантский пинбол, многопользовательская игра «Захват флага» или какое-либо другое, ещё не придуманное творение. Первый участок виртуальной земли предоставляется бесплатно. Участвуя и создавая интересные вещи, участники ROBLOX могут зарабатывать специальные значки, а также виртуальную валюту ROBLOX («Robux»). В свою очередь, они могут просматривать онлайн-каталог, чтобы приобрести одежду и аксессуары для аватаров, а также премиальные строительные материалы, интерактивные компоненты и рабочие механизмы.

#Roblox #foltyn

¿Qué es Roblox? Roblox es un mundo virtual y plataforma de creación en línea donde niños y niñas de todas las edades pueden interactuar, crear, divertirse y aprender de forma segura. Es único porque prácticamente todo en ROBLOX está diseñado y construido por los miembros de la comunidad. ROBLOX está diseñado para jóvenes de 13 a 18 años, pero está abierto a personas de todas las edades. Cada jugador comienza eligiendo un avatar y dándole una identidad. Luego, puede explorar ROBLOX, interactuando con otros mediante el chat, jugando o colaborando en proyectos creativos. Cada jugador también recibe su propio terreno virtual sin desarrollar, junto con un conjunto de herramientas virtuales para diseñar y construir cualquier cosa: desde un rascacielos navegable o un helicóptero funcional, hasta una máquina de pinball gigante, un juego multijugador de "Captura la Bandera" o cualquier otra creación imaginable. Este primer terreno virtual es gratuito. Al participar y construir cosas increíbles, los miembros de ROBLOX pueden ganar insignias especiales y dólares ROBLOX ("Robux"). Con estos, pueden comprar ropa y accesorios para sus avatares en el catálogo en línea, así como materiales de construcción premium, componentes interactivos y mecanismos funcionales.

#Roblox #foltyn

എന്താണ് Roblox? എല്ലാ പ്രായത്തിലുമുള്ള കുട്ടികൾക്ക് സുരക്ഷിതമായി ഇടപഴകാനും സൃഷ്ടിക്കാനും ആസ്വദിക്കാനും പഠിക്കാനും കഴിയുന്ന ഒരു ഓൺലൈൻ വെർച്വൽ കളിസ്ഥലവും വർക്ക്‌ഷോപ്പുമാണ് ROBLOX. ROBLOX-ലെ പ്രായോഗികമായി എല്ലാം കമ്മ്യൂണിറ്റിയിലെ അംഗങ്ങൾ രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്ത് നിർമ്മിച്ചതാണ് എന്നതാണ് ഇതിന്റെ പ്രത്യേകത. ROBLOX 13 മുതൽ 18 വയസ്സ് വരെ പ്രായമുള്ളവർക്കായി രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്‌തിട്ടുണ്ടെങ്കിലും എല്ലാ പ്രായത്തിലുമുള്ള ആളുകൾക്കും ഇത് തുറന്നിരിക്കുന്നു. ഓരോ കളിക്കാരനും ഒരു അവതാർ തിരഞ്ഞെടുത്ത് അതിന് ഒരു ഐഡന്റിറ്റി നൽകുന്നതിലൂടെയാണ് ആരംഭിക്കുന്നത്. തുടർന്ന് അവർക്ക് ROBLOX പര്യവേക്ഷണം ചെയ്യാൻ കഴിയും - ചാറ്റ് ചെയ്തുകൊണ്ടോ, ഗെയിമുകൾ കളിച്ചോ, അല്ലെങ്കിൽ സൃഷ്ടിപരമായ പ്രോജക്റ്റുകളിൽ സഹകരിച്ചോ മറ്റുള്ളവരുമായി ഇടപഴകുന്നു. ഓരോ കളിക്കാരനും അവരുടേതായ വികസിപ്പിക്കാത്ത റിയൽ എസ്റ്റേറ്റ് കഷണവും, എന്തും രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്യാനും നിർമ്മിക്കാനും കഴിയുന്ന ഒരു വെർച്വൽ ടൂൾബോക്സും നൽകുന്നു - അത് ഒരു നാവിഗേറ്റ് ചെയ്യാവുന്ന അംബരചുംബി, പ്രവർത്തിക്കുന്ന ഹെലികോപ്റ്റർ, ഒരു ഭീമൻ പിൻബോൾ മെഷീൻ, ഒരു മൾട്ടിപ്ലെയർ "ക്യാപ്ചർ ദി ഫ്ലാഗ്" ഗെയിം അല്ലെങ്കിൽ മറ്റേതെങ്കിലും, ഇതുവരെ സ്വപ്നം കാണാത്ത സൃഷ്ടി. വെർച്വൽ ഭൂമിയുടെ ഈ ആദ്യ പ്ലോട്ടിന് യാതൊരു ചെലവുമില്ല. പങ്കെടുക്കുന്നതിലൂടെയും രസകരമായ കാര്യങ്ങൾ നിർമ്മിക്കുന്നതിലൂടെയും, ROBLOX അംഗങ്ങൾക്ക് സ്പെഷ്യാലിറ്റി ബാഡ്ജുകളും ROBLOX ഡോളറുകളും ("Robux") നേടാൻ കഴിയും. അതാകട്ടെ, അവതാർ വസ്ത്രങ്ങളും അനുബന്ധ ഉപകരണങ്ങളും വാങ്ങുന്നതിന് ഓൺലൈൻ കാറ്റലോഗിൽ നിന്ന് വാങ്ങാനും പ്രീമിയം നിർമ്മാണ സാമഗ്രികൾ, സംവേദനാത്മക ഘടകങ്ങൾ, പ്രവർത്തന സംവിധാനങ്ങൾ എന്നിവ വാങ്ങാനും കഴിയും.

Was ist Roblox? Roblox ist ein virtueller Online-Spielplatz und eine Werkstatt, in der Kinder jeden Alters sicher interagieren, kreativ sein, Spaß haben und lernen können. Das Besondere an ROBLOX ist, dass praktisch alles von Mitgliedern der Community entworfen und gebaut wird. ROBLOX ist zwar für 13- bis 18-Jährige gedacht, steht aber allen Altersgruppen offen. Jeder Spieler beginnt mit der Auswahl eines Avatars und gibt ihm eine Identität. Anschließend können sie ROBLOX erkunden und mit anderen chatten, Spiele spielen oder gemeinsam an kreativen Projekten arbeiten. Jeder Spieler erhält außerdem ein eigenes, unbebautes Grundstück sowie eine virtuelle Werkzeugkiste, mit der er alles Mögliche entwerfen und bauen kann – sei es ein begehbarer Wolkenkratzer, ein funktionierender Hubschrauber, ein riesiger Flipperautomat, ein Multiplayer-„Capture the Flag“-Spiel oder eine andere, noch nie dagewesene Kreation. Das erste virtuelle Grundstück ist kostenlos. Durch die Teilnahme und das Erstellen cooler Inhalte können ROBLOX-Mitglieder spezielle Abzeichen und ROBLOX-Dollar („Robux“) verdienen. Damit können sie im Online-Katalog Avatar-Kleidung und -Accessoires sowie Premium-Baumaterialien, interaktive Komponenten und funktionierende Mechanismen kaufen.

రోబ్లాక్స్ అంటే ఏమిటి? రోబ్లాక్స్ అనేది ఒక ఆన్‌లైన్ వర్చువల్ ప్లేగ్రౌండ్ మరియు వర్క్‌షాప్, ఇక్కడ అన్ని వయసుల పిల్లలు సురక్షితంగా ఒకరితో ఒకరు సంభాషించుకోవచ్చు, సృష్టించుకోవచ్చు, ఆనందించవచ్చు మరియు నేర్చుకోవచ్చు. ROBLOX లో దాదాపు ప్రతిదీ కమ్యూనిటీ సభ్యులచే రూపొందించబడి, నిర్మించబడటమే దీని ప్రత్యేకత. ROBLOX 13 నుండి 18 సంవత్సరాల వయస్సు గల వారి కోసం రూపొందించబడింది, కానీ ఇది అన్ని వయసుల వారికి అందుబాటులో ఉంటుంది. ప్రతి ఆటగాడు ఒక అవతార్‌ను ఎంచుకుని, దానికి ఒక గుర్తింపును ఇవ్వడం ద్వారా ప్రారంభిస్తాడు. ఆ తర్వాత వారు చాటింగ్ చేయడం, ఆటలు ఆడటం లేదా సృజనాత్మక ప్రాజెక్టులపై సహకరించుకోవడం ద్వారా ఇతరులతో సంభాషిస్తూ ROBLOX ను అన్వేషించవచ్చు. ప్రతి ఆటగాడికి వారి స్వంత అభివృద్ధి చెందని భూభాగంతో పాటు, ఒక వర్చువల్ టూల్‌బాక్స్ కూడా ఇవ్వబడుతుంది. దానితో వారు దేనినైనా డిజైన్ చేసి నిర్మించవచ్చు — అది ప్రయాణించగల ఆకాశహర్మ్యం కావచ్చు, పనిచేసే హెలికాప్టర్ కావచ్చు, ఒక పెద్ద పిన్‌బాల్ మెషిన్ కావచ్చు, మల్టీప్లేయర్ “క్యాప్చర్ ది ఫ్లాగ్” గేమ్ కావచ్చు లేదా ఇంకా ఊహించని మరేదైనా సృష్టి కావచ్చు. ఈ మొదటి వర్చువల్ భూభాగానికి ఎటువంటి ఖర్చు ఉండదు. పాల్గొనడం ద్వారా మరియు అద్భుతమైన వస్తువులను నిర్మించడం ద్వారా, ROBLOX సభ్యులు ప్రత్యేక బ్యాడ్జ్‌లతో పాటు ROBLOX డాలర్లను (“రోబక్స్”) సంపాదించవచ్చు. దీనికి ప్రతిగా, వారు ఆన్‌లైన్ కేటలాగ్‌లో అవతార్ దుస్తులు మరియు యాక్సెసరీలతో పాటు ప్రీమియం నిర్మాణ సామగ్రి, ఇంటరాక్టివ్ భాగాలు మరియు పనిచేసే యంత్రాంగాలను కొనుగోలు చేయవచ్చు.

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Що таке Roblox? ROBLOX — це віртуальний онлайн-майстерня та майстерня, де діти різного віку можуть безпечно взаємодіяти, творити, розважатися та навчатися. Він унікальний тим, що практично все в ROBLOX розроблено та побудовано членами спільноти. ROBLOX розроблений для дітей віком від 13 до 18 років, але відкритий для людей будь-якого віку. Кожен гравець починає з вибору аватара та надання йому ідентичності. Потім вони можуть досліджувати ROBLOX — взаємодіяти з іншими через чат, ігри або співпрацювати над творчими проектами. Кожному гравцеві також надається власний шматок незабудованої нерухомості разом із віртуальним набором інструментів, за допомогою якого можна проектувати та будувати що завгодно — будь то хмарочос, яким можна керувати, робочий гелікоптер, гігантський пінбольний автомат, багатокористувацька гра «Захоплення прапора» чи якесь інше, ще не вигадане творіння. Ця перша ділянка віртуальної землі безкоштовна. Беручи участь та будуючи круті речі, учасники ROBLOX можуть заробляти спеціальні значки, а також долари ROBLOX («Robux»). У свою чергу, вони можуть купувати одяг та аксесуари для аватарів в онлайн-каталозі, а також преміальні будівельні матеріали, інтерактивні компоненти та робочі механізми.


#Roblox #foltyn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Roblox ਕੀ ਹੈ? ROBLOX ਇੱਕ ਔਨਲਾਈਨ ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਖੇਡ ਦਾ ਮੈਦਾਨ ਅਤੇ ਵਰਕਸ਼ਾਪ ਹੈ, ਜਿੱਥੇ ਹਰ ਉਮਰ ਦੇ ਬੱਚੇ ਸੁਰੱਖਿਅਤ ਢੰਗ ਨਾਲ ਗੱਲਬਾਤ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ, ਬਣਾ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ, ਮੌਜ-ਮਸਤੀ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ ਅਤੇ ਸਿੱਖ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ। ਇਹ ਇਸ ਪੱਖੋਂ ਵਿਲੱਖਣ ਹੈ ਕਿ ROBLOX 'ਤੇ ਲਗਭਗ ਹਰ ਚੀਜ਼ ਭਾਈਚਾਰੇ ਦੇ ਮੈਂਬਰਾਂ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਡਿਜ਼ਾਈਨ ਅਤੇ ਬਣਾਈ ਗਈ ਹੈ। ROBLOX 13 ਤੋਂ 18 ਸਾਲ ਦੀ ਉਮਰ ਦੇ ਬੱਚਿਆਂ ਲਈ ਤਿਆਰ ਕੀਤਾ ਗਿਆ ਹੈ, ਪਰ ਇਹ ਹਰ ਉਮਰ ਦੇ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਲਈ ਖੁੱਲ੍ਹਾ ਹੈ। ਹਰੇਕ ਖਿਡਾਰੀ ਇੱਕ ਅਵਤਾਰ ਚੁਣ ਕੇ ਅਤੇ ਇਸਨੂੰ ਇੱਕ ਪਛਾਣ ਦੇ ਕੇ ਸ਼ੁਰੂਆਤ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ। ਉਹ ਫਿਰ ROBLOX ਦੀ ਪੜਚੋਲ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ — ਗੱਲਬਾਤ ਕਰਕੇ, ਗੇਮਾਂ ਖੇਡ ਕੇ, ਜਾਂ ਰਚਨਾਤਮਕ ਪ੍ਰੋਜੈਕਟਾਂ 'ਤੇ ਸਹਿਯੋਗ ਕਰਕੇ ਦੂਜਿਆਂ ਨਾਲ ਗੱਲਬਾਤ ਕਰਦੇ ਹੋਏ। ਹਰੇਕ ਖਿਡਾਰੀ ਨੂੰ ਇੱਕ ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਟੂਲਬਾਕਸ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ-ਨਾਲ ਆਪਣੀ ਅਣਵਿਕਸਿਤ ਰੀਅਲ ਅਸਟੇਟ ਦਾ ਇੱਕ ਟੁਕੜਾ ਵੀ ਦਿੱਤਾ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ ਜਿਸ ਨਾਲ ਉਹ ਕੁਝ ਵੀ ਡਿਜ਼ਾਈਨ ਅਤੇ ਬਣਾ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ — ਭਾਵੇਂ ਇਹ ਇੱਕ ਨੇਵੀਗੇਬਲ ਸਕਾਈਸਕ੍ਰੈਪਰ ਹੋਵੇ, ਇੱਕ ਕੰਮ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲਾ ਹੈਲੀਕਾਪਟਰ ਹੋਵੇ, ਇੱਕ ਵਿਸ਼ਾਲ ਪਿੰਨਬਾਲ ਮਸ਼ੀਨ ਹੋਵੇ, ਇੱਕ ਮਲਟੀਪਲੇਅਰ "ਕੈਪਚਰ ਦ ਫਲੈਗ" ਗੇਮ ਹੋਵੇ ਜਾਂ ਕੋਈ ਹੋਰ, ਅਜੇ ਤੱਕ ਸੁਪਨੇ ਵਿੱਚ ਨਹੀਂ ਆਈ ਰਚਨਾ। ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਜ਼ਮੀਨ ਦੇ ਇਸ ਪਹਿਲੇ ਪਲਾਟ ਲਈ ਕੋਈ ਕੀਮਤ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੈ। ਹਿੱਸਾ ਲੈ ਕੇ ਅਤੇ ਵਧੀਆ ਚੀਜ਼ਾਂ ਬਣਾ ਕੇ, ROBLOX ਮੈਂਬਰ ROBLOX ਡਾਲਰਾਂ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ-ਨਾਲ ਵਿਸ਼ੇਸ਼ ਬੈਜ ("Robux") ਵੀ ਕਮਾ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ। ਬਦਲੇ ਵਿੱਚ, ਉਹ ਅਵਤਾਰ ਕੱਪੜੇ ਅਤੇ ਸਹਾਇਕ ਉਪਕਰਣਾਂ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ-ਨਾਲ ਪ੍ਰੀਮੀਅਮ ਬਿਲਡਿੰਗ ਸਮੱਗਰੀ, ਇੰਟਰਐਕਟਿਵ ਹਿੱਸੇ ਅਤੇ ਕੰਮ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲੇ ਵਿਧੀਆਂ ਖਰੀਦਣ ਲਈ ਔਨਲਾਈਨ ਕੈਟਾਲਾਗ ਖਰੀਦ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ।

로블록스란 무엇일까요? 로블록스는 모든 연령대의 아이들이 안전하게 소통하고, 만들고, 즐기고, 배울 수 있는 온라인 가상 놀이터이자 작업 공간입니다. ROBLOX는 거의 모든 콘텐츠를 커뮤니티 회원들이 직접 디자인하고 제작한다는 점에서 독특합니다. ROBLOX는 13세에서 18세 사이의 사용자를 위해 설계되었지만, 모든 연령대의 사람들이 이용할 수 있습니다. 모든 플레이어는 아바타를 선택하고 자신만의 정체성을 부여하는 것으로 시작합니다. 그런 다음 ROBLOX를 탐험하며 다른 사용자와 채팅하고, 게임을 플레이하고, 창의적인 프로젝트를 공동 작업하는 등 다양한 방식으로 소통할 수 있습니다. 각 플레이어에게는 개발되지 않은 가상 토지와 가상 도구 상자가 제공되어 무엇이든 디자인하고 만들 수 있습니다. 실제로 움직일 수 있는 고층 빌딩, 작동하는 헬리콥터, 거대한 핀볼 기계, 멀티플레이어 "깃발 뺏기" 게임, 또는 아직 상상조차 하지 못한 창작물까지 만들어낼 수 있습니다. 이 첫 번째 가상 토지는 무료로 제공됩니다. ROBLOX 회원들은 참여하고 멋진 작품을 만들면서 특별 배지와 ROBLOX 달러("Robux")를 획득할 수 있습니다. 획득한 Robux로는 온라인 카탈로그에서 아바타 의상과 액세서리, 프리미엄 건축 자재, 상호 작용 구성 요소, 작동 메커니즘 등을 구매할 수 있습니다.

Nome Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Cos'è Roblox? ROBLOX è un parco giochi e laboratorio virtuale online, dove i ragazzi di tutte le età possono interagire, creare, divertirsi e imparare in tutta sicurezza. La sua particolarità è che praticamente tutto su ROBLOX è progettato e costruito dai membri della community. ROBLOX è pensato per ragazzi dai 13 ai 18 anni, ma è aperto a persone di tutte le età. Ogni giocatore inizia scegliendo un avatar e dandogli un'identità. Può quindi esplorare ROBLOX, interagendo con gli altri tramite chat, giocando o collaborando a progetti creativi. Ogni giocatore riceve anche un proprio appezzamento di terreno virtuale non edificato, insieme a una cassetta degli attrezzi virtuale con cui progettare e costruire qualsiasi cosa: un grattacielo navigabile, un elicottero funzionante, un flipper gigante, un gioco multiplayer "Cattura la bandiera" o qualsiasi altra creazione ancora da immaginare. Questo primo appezzamento di terreno virtuale è gratuito. Partecipando e costruendo cose interessanti, i membri di ROBLOX possono guadagnare badge speciali e dollari ROBLOX ("Robux"). A loro volta, possono utilizzare questi Robux per acquistare abbigliamento e accessori per il proprio avatar, nonché materiali da costruzione di alta qualità, componenti interattivi e meccanismi funzionanti dal catalogo online.

#Roblox #foltyn

מה זה רובלוקס? רובלוקס הוא גן שעשועים וירטואלי מקוון וסדנה, שבו ילדים בכל הגילאים יכולים לתקשר, ליצור, ליהנות וללמוד בבטחה. זה ייחודי בכך שכמעט כל דבר ב-ROBLOX מתוכנן ונבנה על ידי חברי הקהילה. ROBLOX מיועד לגילאי 13 עד 18, אך פתוח לאנשים בכל הגילאים. כל שחקן מתחיל בבחירת אווטאר ומתן זהות לו. לאחר מכן הם יכולים לחקור את ROBLOX - לתקשר עם אחרים על ידי צ'אט, משחקי משחקים או שיתוף פעולה בפרויקטים יצירתיים. כל שחקן מקבל גם פיסת קרקע לא מפותחת משלו יחד עם ארגז כלים וירטואלי שבעזרתו ניתן לעצב ולבנות כל דבר - בין אם זה גורד שחקים ניווט, מסוק פעיל, מכונת פינבול ענקית, משחק מרובה משתתפים "לכידת הדגל" או יצירה אחרת שטרם הומצאה. אין עלות עבור חלקת אדמה וירטואלית ראשונה זו. על ידי השתתפות ובניית דברים מגניבים, חברי ROBLOX יכולים להרוויח תגים מיוחדים וכן דולרים של ROBLOX ("Robux"). בתורם, הם יכולים לקנות בקטלוג המקוון בגדים ואביזרים לאווטארים, כמו גם חומרי בנייה איכותיים, רכיבים אינטראקטיביים ומנגנונים פועלים.

Wat is Roblox? ROBLOX is een online virtuele speelplaats en werkplaats waar kinderen van alle leeftijden veilig kunnen spelen, creëren, plezier hebben en leren. Het is uniek omdat vrijwel alles op ROBLOX is ontworpen en gebouwd door leden van de community. ROBLOX is ontworpen voor jongeren van 13 tot 18 jaar, maar is toegankelijk voor mensen van alle leeftijden. Elke speler begint met het kiezen van een avatar en het geven van een identiteit. Vervolgens kunnen ze ROBLOX verkennen en interactie hebben met anderen door te chatten, games te spelen of samen te werken aan creatieve projecten. Elke speler krijgt ook een eigen stuk onontwikkeld virtueel land, samen met een virtuele gereedschapskist waarmee ze van alles kunnen ontwerpen en bouwen – of het nu een begaanbare wolkenkrabber, een werkende helikopter, een gigantische flipperkast, een multiplayer 'Capture the Flag'-spel of een andere, nog te bedenken creatie is. Dit eerste stuk virtuele land is gratis. Door deel te nemen en coole dingen te bouwen, kunnen ROBLOX-leden speciale badges en ROBLOX-dollars ('Robux') verdienen. Hiermee kunnen ze vervolgens in de online catalogus winkelen om kleding en accessoires voor hun avatar te kopen, evenals premium bouwmaterialen, interactieve componenten en werkende mechanismen.

#Roblox #foltyn

রোব্লক্স কী? রোব্লক্স হলো একটি অনলাইন ভার্চুয়াল খেলার মাঠ এবং কর্মশালা, যেখানে সব বয়সের শিশুরা নিরাপদে একে অপরের সাথে যোগাযোগ করতে, কিছু তৈরি করতে, মজা করতে এবং শিখতে পারে। এর বিশেষত্ব হলো, ROBLOX-এর প্রায় সবকিছুই কমিউনিটির সদস্যদের দ্বারা ডিজাইন ও নির্মাণ করা হয়। ROBLOX মূলত ১৩ থেকে ১৮ বছর বয়সীদের জন্য তৈরি, কিন্তু এটি সব বয়সের মানুষের জন্য উন্মুক্ত। প্রত্যেক খেলোয়াড় একটি অ্যাভাটার বেছে নিয়ে এবং সেটিকে একটি পরিচয় দিয়ে খেলা শুরু করে। এরপর তারা ROBLOX-এ ঘুরে বেড়াতে পারে — চ্যাট করে, গেম খেলে বা সৃজনশীল প্রকল্পে সহযোগিতা করে অন্যদের সাথে যোগাযোগ স্থাপন করতে পারে। প্রত্যেক খেলোয়াড়কে তাদের নিজস্ব এক টুকরো অনুন্নত জমি এবং একটি ভার্চুয়াল টুলবক্সও দেওয়া হয়, যা দিয়ে তারা যেকোনো কিছু ডিজাইন ও নির্মাণ করতে পারে — তা হতে পারে চলাচলযোগ্য একটি আকাশচুম্বী ভবন, একটি সচল হেলিকপ্টার, একটি বিশাল পিনবল মেশিন, একটি মাল্টিপ্লেয়ার “ক্যাপচার দ্য ফ্ল্যাগ” গেম বা অন্য কোনো অকল্পনীয় সৃষ্টি। এই প্রথম ভার্চুয়াল জমির প্লটটির জন্য কোনো খরচ নেই। অংশগ্রহণ করে এবং চমৎকার জিনিস তৈরি করে, ROBLOX-এর সদস্যরা বিশেষ ব্যাজ এবং ROBLOX ডলার (“Robux”) অর্জন করতে পারে। এর মাধ্যমে, তারা অনলাইন ক্যাটালগ থেকে অ্যাভাটারের পোশাক ও আনুষঙ্গিক জিনিসপত্র, সেইসাথে প্রিমিয়াম নির্মাণ সামগ্রী, ইন্টারেক্টিভ উপাদান এবং সচল যন্ত্রাংশ কিনতে পারে।

#রোব্লক্স #ফলটিন

Nazwa w Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Co to jest Roblox? ROBLOX to wirtualny plac zabaw i warsztat online, gdzie dzieci w każdym wieku mogą bezpiecznie wchodzić w interakcje, tworzyć, bawić się i uczyć. Jego wyjątkowość polega na tym, że praktycznie wszystko w ROBLOX jest projektowane i konstruowane przez członków społeczności. ROBLOX jest przeznaczony dla osób w wieku od 13 do 18 lat, ale jest otwarty dla osób w każdym wieku. Każdy gracz zaczyna od wyboru awatara i nadania mu tożsamości. Następnie może odkrywać ROBLOX — wchodząc w interakcje z innymi poprzez czatowanie, granie w gry lub współpracę przy kreatywnych projektach. Każdy gracz otrzymuje również własny kawałek niezagospodarowanej nieruchomości wraz z wirtualnym zestawem narzędzi, za pomocą którego może projektować i budować cokolwiek — czy to nawigowalny wieżowiec, działający helikopter, gigantyczny flipper, grę wieloosobową „Capture the Flag” czy inne, jeszcze niewyobrażalne dzieło. Ta pierwsza wirtualna działka jest darmowa. Uczestnicząc w zabawie i budując fajne rzeczy, członkowie ROBLOX mogą zdobywać specjalne odznaki, a także dolary ROBLOX („Robux”). Z kolei użytkownicy mogą przeglądać katalog online, aby kupić ubrania i akcesoria awatara, a także wysokiej jakości materiały budowlane, interaktywne komponenty i mechanizmy robocze.

Robloxとは？ Robloxは、あらゆる年齢の子どもたちが安全に交流し、創造し、楽しみ、学ぶことができるオンライン仮想空間の遊び場であり、ワークショップです。 ROBLOXのユニークな点は、ほぼすべてのものがコミュニティのメンバーによって設計および構築されていることです。ROBLOXは13歳から18歳向けに設計されていますが、あらゆる年齢の人が利用できます。各プレイヤーはまずアバターを選択し、アイデンティティを設定します。その後、ROBLOXを探索し、チャット、ゲーム、クリエイティブなプロジェクトでのコラボレーションなどを通じて他のプレイヤーと交流できます。各プレイヤーには、未開発の仮想土地と、ナビゲーション可能な超高層ビル、実際に動くヘリコプター、巨大なピンボールマシン、マルチプレイヤーの「キャプチャー・ザ・フラッグ」ゲーム、あるいはまだ誰も想像もしていないような創造物など、あらゆるものを設計および構築するための仮想ツールボックスが与えられます。この最初の仮想土地は無料です。ROBLOXメンバーは、参加して素晴らしいものを制作することで、特別なバッジやROBLOXドル（「Robux」）を獲得できます。彼らはオンラインカタログで、アバターの服やアクセサリー、プレミアム建築資材、インタラクティブなコンポーネント、動作するメカニズムなどを購入できます。

#Roblox #foltyn

Nome no Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

O que é Roblox? ROBLOX é um playground e oficina virtual online, onde crianças de todas as idades podem interagir, criar, se divertir e aprender com segurança. O que torna o ROBLOX único é o fato de praticamente tudo nele ser projetado e construído por membros da comunidade. O ROBLOX é voltado para jovens de 13 a 18 anos, mas é aberto a pessoas de todas as idades. Cada jogador começa escolhendo um avatar e dando a ele uma identidade. Em seguida, pode explorar o ROBLOX — interagindo com outros jogadores por meio de bate-papo, jogos ou colaborando em projetos criativos. Cada jogador também recebe seu próprio terreno virtual não desenvolvido, juntamente com uma caixa de ferramentas virtual para projetar e construir qualquer coisa — seja um arranha-céu navegável, um helicóptero funcional, uma máquina de pinball gigante, um jogo multiplayer de "Capture a Bandeira" ou alguma outra criação ainda não imaginada. Não há custo para este primeiro terreno virtual. Ao participar e construir coisas legais, os membros do ROBLOX podem ganhar distintivos especiais, bem como dólares ROBLOX ("Robux"). Por sua vez, eles podem usar os Robux para comprar roupas e acessórios para seus avatares no catálogo online, além de materiais de construção premium, componentes interativos e mecanismos funcionais.

#Roblox #foltyn

रोब्लॉक्स क्या है? रोब्लॉक्स एक ऑनलाइन वर्चुअल प्लेग्राउंड और वर्कशॉप है, जहां सभी उम्र के बच्चे सुरक्षित रूप से एक-दूसरे से बातचीत कर सकते हैं, कुछ नया बना सकते हैं, मज़े कर सकते हैं और सीख सकते हैं। ROBLOX की खासियत यह है कि इस पर लगभग सब कुछ समुदाय के सदस्यों द्वारा ही डिज़ाइन और निर्मित किया जाता है। ROBLOX 13 से 18 वर्ष की आयु के लोगों के लिए डिज़ाइन किया गया है, लेकिन यह सभी उम्र के लोगों के लिए खुला है। प्रत्येक खिलाड़ी एक अवतार चुनकर और उसे एक पहचान देकर शुरुआत करता है। फिर वे ROBLOX को एक्सप्लोर कर सकते हैं - दूसरों के साथ चैट करके, गेम खेलकर या रचनात्मक परियोजनाओं पर सहयोग करके बातचीत कर सकते हैं। प्रत्येक खिलाड़ी को एक अविकसित वर्चुअल ज़मीन का टुकड़ा और एक वर्चुअल टूलबॉक्स भी दिया जाता है, जिससे वे कुछ भी डिज़ाइन और निर्माण कर सकते हैं - चाहे वह चलने-फिरने योग्य गगनचुंबी इमारत हो, एक चलता-फिरता हेलीकॉप्टर हो, एक विशाल पिनबॉल मशीन हो, एक मल्टीप्लेयर "कैप्चर द फ्लैग" गेम हो या कोई अन्य, अभी तक कल्पना भी न की गई रचना। इस पहले वर्चुअल ज़मीन के टुकड़े के लिए कोई कीमत नहीं है। भाग लेकर और शानदार चीज़ें बनाकर, ROBLOX सदस्य विशेष बैज और ROBLOX डॉलर ("Robux") कमा सकते हैं। बदले में, वे ऑनलाइन कैटलॉग से अवतार के कपड़े और एक्सेसरीज़ के साथ-साथ प्रीमियम निर्माण सामग्री, इंटरैक्टिव कंपोनेंट और काम करने वाले मैकेनिज़्म खरीद सकते हैं।


#रोब्लॉक्स #फोल्टिन

ரோப்லாக்ஸ் என்றால் என்ன? ரோப்லாக்ஸ் என்பது ஒரு ஆன்லைன் மெய்நிகர் விளையாட்டுத் தளம் மற்றும் பட்டறை ஆகும். இங்கு அனைத்து வயது குழந்தைகளும் பாதுகாப்பாகப் பழகலாம், உருவாக்கலாம், மகிழலாம் மற்றும் கற்றுக்கொள்ளலாம். ROBLOX-இல் உள்ள அனைத்தும் சமூக உறுப்பினர்களால் வடிவமைக்கப்பட்டு உருவாக்கப்படுகின்றன என்பதில் இது தனித்துவமானது. ROBLOX 13 முதல் 18 வயதுடையவர்களுக்காக வடிவமைக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது, ஆனால் இது எல்லா வயதினருக்கும் திறந்திருக்கும். ஒவ்வொரு வீரரும் ஒரு அவதாரத்தைத் தேர்ந்தெடுத்து அதற்கு ஒரு அடையாளத்தை வழங்குவதன் மூலம் தொடங்குகிறார்கள். பின்னர் அவர்கள் ROBLOX-ஐ ஆராயலாம் — அரட்டையடிப்பது, விளையாடுவது அல்லது ஆக்கப்பூர்வமான திட்டங்களில் இணைந்து பணியாற்றுவது போன்றவற்றின் மூலம் மற்றவர்களுடன் தொடர்பு கொள்ளலாம். ஒவ்வொரு வீரருக்கும், பயணிக்கக்கூடிய வானளாவிய கட்டிடம், இயங்கும் ஹெலிகாப்டர், ஒரு பெரிய பின்தட்டு இயந்திரம், பல வீரர்கள் விளையாடும் "கொடியைக் கைப்பற்று" விளையாட்டு அல்லது இதுவரை கனவு காணப்படாத வேறு ஏதேனும் ஒரு படைப்பு என எதையும் வடிவமைத்து உருவாக்க, ஒரு மெய்நிகர் கருவிப்பெட்டியுடன், மேம்படுத்தப்படாத சொந்த நிலமும் வழங்கப்படுகிறது. இந்த முதல் மெய்நிகர் நிலத்துண்டுக்கு எந்தக் கட்டணமும் இல்லை. பங்கேற்பதன் மூலமும், அருமையான பொருட்களை உருவாக்குவதன் மூலமும், ROBLOX உறுப்பினர்கள் சிறப்புப் பதக்கங்களையும் ROBLOX டாலர்களையும் ("Robux") சம்பாதிக்கலாம். இதன் மூலம், அவர்கள் ஆன்லைன் பட்டியலில் இருந்து அவதார் ஆடைகள் மற்றும் அணிகலன்கள், அத்துடன் பிரீமியம் கட்டுமானப் பொருட்கள், ஊடாடும் கூறுகள் மற்றும் இயங்கும் இயந்திர அமைப்புகளை வாங்கலாம்.

#ரோப்லாக்ஸ் #ஃபோல்டின்

id.title: Roblox Would You Rather, Edisi Meme..
id.description:
Hari ini aku main Would You Rather, Edisi Meme. Pastikan kalian menonton video ini sampai habis untuk tahu apa yang terjadi.

Merchandise: https://foltyn.shop/

Gabung ke channel ini untuk mendapatkan akses ke keuntungan:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Media Sosial--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Grup Roblox: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Nama Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX — berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun — baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

#Roblox #foltyn

hi.title: समुद्र के नीचे का रहस्य | पूर्ण एनिमेशन | फ्री फायर ऑफिशियल
hi.description:
समुद्र के नीचे का रहस्य आ गया है, क्या आप गोता लगाने के लिए तैयार हैं? 🌊🐠 अज्ञात की गहराइयों से, रहस्य, खतरे और छिपे हुए खजाने उन साहसी लोगों का इंतजार कर रहे हैं जो गोता लगाने की हिम्मत रखते हैं। समुद्र के साम्राज्य में कदम रखें, रहस्य को उजागर करें और अपने पुरस्कार पाने के लिए लहरों से लड़ते हुए आगे बढ़ें। गहराइयां पुकार रही हैं... क्या आप जवाब देंगे?

#FFUnderseaMystery #FreeFire #Booyah

id.title: Misteri Bawah Laut | Animasi Lengkap | Free Fire Resmi
id.description:
Misteri Bawah Laut telah tiba, apakah kamu siap untuk menyelam? 🌊🐠 Dari kedalaman yang tak dikenal, rahasia, bahaya, dan harta karun tersembunyi menanti mereka yang cukup berani untuk menyelam. Masuki dunia samudra, ungkap misterinya, dan berjuanglah melewati arus untuk mengklaim hadiahmu. Kedalaman memanggil… akankah kamu menjawabnya?

#FFUnderseaMystery #FreeFire #Booyah

ta.title: கடலடி மர்மம் | முழு அனிமேஷன் | ஃப்ரீ ஃபயர் அதிகாரப்பூர்வமானது
ta.description:
கடலடி மர்மம் வந்துவிட்டது, உள்ளே மூழ்கத் தயாரா? 🌊🐠அறியப்படாத ஆழத்திலிருந்து, உள்ளே மூழ்கத் துணிந்தவர்களுக்காக இரகசியங்கள், ஆபத்துகள் மற்றும் மறைக்கப்பட்ட புதையல்கள் காத்திருக்கின்றன. கடலின் சாம்ராஜ்யத்திற்குள் அடியெடுத்து வையுங்கள், மர்மத்தை வெளிக்கொணருங்கள், மேலும் உங்கள் வெகுமதிகளைப் பெற நீரோட்டங்களுக்கு எதிராகப் போராடுங்கள். ஆழ்கடல் உங்களை அழைக்கிறது... நீங்கள் பதிலளிப்பீர்களா?

#FFUnderseaMystery #FreeFire #Booyah

snippet.title: Måneskin - Beggin' (Testo/(Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Subscribe and press (🔔) to join the Notification Squad and stay updated with new uploads

Follow Måneskin:
https://www.instagram.com/maneskinofficial
https://www.facebook.com/maneskinofficial
https://twitter.com/thisismaneskin

Lyrics:

[Intro]
Put your lovin' hand out, baby
'Cause I'm beggin'

[Chorus]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out, darlin'

[Verse 1]
Ridin' high when I was king
I played it hard and fast, 'cause I had everything
I walked away, you warned me then
But easy come and easy go and it would end

[Verse 2]
So anytime I bleed, you let me go
Yah, anytime I feed, you get me, no
Anytime I seek, you let me know
But I plant and seed, just let me go
I'm on my knees when I'm beggin'
'Cause I don't wanna lose you
Hey, yeah, ra-ta-ta-ta!

[Chorus]
'Cause I'm beggin', beggin' you
Uh, put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you, ah
And put your lovin' hand out, darlin'

[Verse 3]
I need you to understand
Tried so hard to be your man
The kind of man you want in the end
Only then can I begin to live again

[Verse 4]
An empty shell, I used to be
The shadow of my life was hangin' over me
A broken man that I don't know
Won't even stand the devil's dance to win my soul

[Verse 5]
What we doin'? What we chasin'?
Why the bottom? Why the basement?
Why we got good shit, don't embrace it?
Why the feel for the need to replace me?
You're the wrong way track from the good
I wanna paint a picture tellin' where we could be at
Like a heart in the best way should
You can give it away, you had it and you took the pay
But I keep walkin' on, keep openin' doors
Keep hopin' for, now the door is yours
Keep also home
'Cause I don't wanna live in a broken home, girl, I'm beggin'

[Chorus]
Mmm, yeah, yeah, I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, darlin'

[Bridge]
I'm fightin' hard to hold my own
Just can't make it all alone
I'm holdin' on, I can't fall back
I'm just a calm, 'bout to fade to black

[Chorus]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
Put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, darlin'
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, darlin'

[Outro]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out

Tags

de-DE.title: Moonlight - Beggin' (Testo/(Lyrics)
de-DE.description:
Abonniere und aktiviere die Benachrichtigungen (🔔), um keine neuen Uploads zu verpassen!

Folge Måneskin:
https://www.instagram.com/maneskinofficial
https://www.facebook.com/maneskinofficial
https://twitter.com/thisismaneskin

Songtext:

[Intro]
Streck mir deine Hand hin, Baby
Denn ich flehe dich an

[Chorus]
Ich flehe dich an
Also streck mir deine Hand hin, Baby
Ich flehe dich an
Also streck mir deine Hand hin, Liebling

[Verse 1]
Ich war der König, als ich noch ganz oben war
Ich habe alles gegeben, denn ich hatte alles
Ich bin gegangen, du hast mich gewarnt
Aber wie es so schön heißt: schnell gewonnen, schnell verloren

[Verse 2]
Also, wann immer ich blute, lässt du mich Los geht's
Ja, immer wenn ich esse, bekommst du mich, nein
Immer wenn ich suche, lässt du mich wissen
Aber ich säe und säe, lass mich einfach gehen
Ich knie nieder, wenn ich bettle
Denn ich will dich nicht verlieren
Hey, ja, ra-ta-ta-ta!

[Refrain]
Denn ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Uh, streck deine liebevolle Hand aus, Baby
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an, ah
Und streck deine liebevolle Hand aus, Liebling

[Strophe 3]
Ich brauche dein Verständnis
Ich habe so sehr versucht, dein Mann zu sein
Der Mann, den du am Ende willst
Nur dann kann ich wieder anfangen zu leben

[Strophe 4]
Eine leere Hülle war ich einst
Der Schatten meines Lebens hing über mir
Ein gebrochener Mann, den ich nicht kenne
Der nicht einmal den Tanz des Teufels ertragen will, um meine Seele zu gewinnen

[Strophe 5]
Was tun wir? Was jagen wir?
Warum der Tiefpunkt? Warum der Keller?
Warum nutzen wir unsere guten Sachen nicht?
Warum das Bedürfnis, mich zu ersetzen?

Du bist auf dem falschen Weg, weg vom Guten.
Ich will dir ein Bild malen, wo wir sein könnten.
So wie es ein Herz im besten Sinne tun sollte.
Du kannst es weggeben, du hattest es und hast die Quittung bekommen.
Aber ich gehe weiter, öffne immer neue Türen.
Hoffe weiter, denn jetzt gehört dir die Tür.
Bleib auch zu Hause.

Denn ich will nicht in einem zerbrochenen Zuhause leben, Mädchen, ich flehe dich an.

[Refrain]
Mmm, ja, ja, ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an.

Also streck deine liebevolle Hand aus, Baby.

Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an.

Also streck deine liebevolle Hand aus, Liebling.

[Bridge]
Ich kämpfe hart, um auf eigenen Beinen zu stehen.
Ich schaffe es einfach nicht allein.
Ich halte durch, ich kann nicht zurückfallen.
Ich bin nur noch ruhig, kurz davor zu verblassen. Schwarz

[Refrain]
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus, Baby
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus, Liebling
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus, Baby
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus, Liebling

[Outro]
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus, Baby
Ich flehe dich an, flehe dich an
Streck deine Hand aus

Tags

es-US.title: Luz de luna - Empezando (Testo/(Letra)
es-US.description:
Suscríbete y activa las notificaciones (🔔) para unirte al grupo de notificaciones y estar al tanto de las nuevas publicaciones.

Sigue a Måneskin:
https://www.instagram.com/maneskinofficial
https://www.facebook.com/maneskinofficial
https://twitter.com/thisismaneskin

Letra:

[Introducción]
Extiende tu mano, cariño
Porque te lo ruego

[Estribillo]
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano, cariño
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano, mi amor

[Estrofa 1]
En la cima cuando era rey
Jugué duro y rápido, porque lo tenía todo
Me fui, me lo advertiste entonces
Pero lo que fácil viene, fácil se va, y todo terminaría

[Estrofa 2]
Así que cada vez que sangro, me dejas ir
Sí, cada vez que me alimento, tú No me busques, no
Siempre que te busco, me lo haces saber
Pero siembro y siembro, déjame ir
Estoy de rodillas cuando te ruego
Porque no quiero perderte
¡Oye, sí, ra-ta-ta-ta!

[Estribillo]
Porque te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Uh, extiende tu mano amorosa, cariño
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego, ah
Y extiende tu mano amorosa, mi amor

[Estrofa 3]
Necesito que lo entiendas
Me esforcé tanto por ser tu hombre
El tipo de hombre que quieres al final
Solo entonces podré volver a vivir

[Estrofa 4]
Un cascarón vacío, solía ser
La sombra de mi vida me perseguía
Un hombre roto que no conozco
Ni siquiera soportaré el baile del diablo para ganar mi alma

[Estrofa 5]
¿Qué estamos haciendo? ¿Qué estamos persiguiendo?

¿Por qué el fondo? ¿Por qué el sótano?

¿Por qué tenemos cosas buenas y no las aprovechamos?

¿Por qué esta necesidad de reemplazarme?
Eres el camino equivocado, lejos del bien
Quiero pintar un cuadro que muestre dónde podríamos estar
Como un corazón en el mejor sentido
Puedes regalarlo, lo tuviste y te llevaste el pago
Pero sigo caminando, sigo abriendo puertas
Sigo esperando, ahora la puerta es tuya
Quédate también en casa
Porque no quiero vivir en un hogar roto, chica, te lo ruego

[Estribillo]
Mmm, sí, sí, te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano amorosa, nena
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano amorosa, cariño

[Puente]
Lucho con todas mis fuerzas para mantenerme firme
No puedo hacerlo solo
Me aferro, no puedo retroceder
Solo estoy tranquilo, a punto de desvanecerme en la oscuridad

[Estribillo]
Soy Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Extiende tu mano amorosa, cariño
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano amorosa, mi amor
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano amorosa, cariño
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano amorosa, mi amor

[Outro]
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano amorosa, cariño
Te lo ruego, te lo ruego
Así que extiende tu mano amorosa

https://twitter.com/thisismaneskin

Letra:

[Intro]
Estenda sua mão, meu bem
Porque eu estou implorando

[Refrão]
Estou implorando, implorando a você
Então estenda sua mão, meu bem
Estou implorando, implorando a você
Então estenda sua mão, querida

[Verso 1]
No auge, quando eu era rei
Eu jogava duro e rápido, porque eu tinha tudo
Eu fui embora, você me avisou
Mas o que vem fácil, vai fácil, e tudo acabaria

[Verso 2]
Então, sempre que eu sangro, você me deixa ir
Sim, sempre que eu Alimente-me, você me entende, não
Sempre que eu procuro, você me avisa
Mas eu planto e semeio, apenas me deixe ir
Estou de joelhos quando imploro
Porque eu não quero te perder
Ei, sim, ra-ta-ta-ta!

[Refrão]
Porque eu estou implorando, implorando a você
Uh, estenda sua mão amorosa, querida
Eu estou implorando, implorando a você, ah
E estenda sua mão amorosa, querida

[Verso 3]
Eu preciso que você entenda
Me esforcei tanto para ser o seu homem
O tipo de homem que você quer no final
Só então poderei começar a viver de novo

[Verso 4]
Uma casca vazia, eu costumava ser
A sombra da minha vida pairava sobre mim
Um homem destruído que eu não reconheço
Nem sequer suporto a dança do diabo para conquistar minha alma

[Verso 5]
O que estamos fazendo? O que estamos perseguindo?

Por que o fundo do poço? Por que o porão?

Por que temos coisas boas e não as aproveitamos?

Por que essa necessidade de me substituir?
Você está no caminho errado, longe do bom
Quero pintar um quadro mostrando onde poderíamos estar
Como um coração, da melhor maneira possível
Você pode desistir, você o tinha e levou o pagamento
Mas eu continuo caminhando, continuo abrindo portas
Continuo esperando, agora a porta é sua
Fique em casa também
Porque eu não quero viver em um lar destruído, garota, eu imploro

[Refrão]
Mmm, sim, sim, eu imploro, imploro a você
Então estenda sua mão amorosa, querida
Eu imploro, imploro a você
Então estenda sua mão amorosa, querida

[Ponte]
Estou lutando muito para me manter firme
Simplesmente não consigo fazer tudo sozinho
Estou me agarrando, não posso recuar
Estou apenas calmo, prestes a desaparecer na escuridão

[Refrão]
Eu estou Implorando, implorando a você
Estenda sua mão amorosa, querida
Estou implorando, implorando a você
Então estenda sua mão amorosa, querida
Estou implorando, implorando a você
Então estenda sua mão amorosa, querida
Estou implorando, implorando a você
Então estenda sua mão amorosa, querida

Então estenda sua mão amorosa

snippet.title: Ae Ajnabee (Official Music Video) - Aditya Rikhari, Ravator, Kutle Khan | Coke Studio Bharat
snippet.description:
Coke Studio Bharat Season 4 opens with #AeAjnabee, a melodic journey into the heart of longing. Love may change its language, but that timeless ache for connection remains. Aditya Rikhari's warm vocals meet Kutle Khan's iconic Rajasthani folk sound, all brought together by producer and DJ, Ravator. This track bridges generations; letting the depth of folk breathe within pop's groovy sound. It's for those who remember whispered poetry and those who send late-night texts - a celebration of modern romance rooted in emotion.

Listen to Ae Ajnabee: http://UMGI.lnk.to/AeAjnabee  

CREDITS

Composed & Performed by: Aditya Rikhari, Ravator, Kutle Khan
Written by: Aditya Rikhari, Kutle Khan 
Producer: Ravator
Drums: Suyash Gabriel 
Keys: Swapnil Tare
Acoustic Guitar: Solomon Konwar Rengma
Tabla: Shariq Mustafa
Bass: Sashi Bhushan 
Sarangi: Vanraj Shastri
Mixed & Mastered by Mukul Jain at Ferris Wheel Studios
Recording Engineer: Jay Rana

In House Band
Chorus Singers: Chirag Shetty, Edwin Louis Viswanath, Riyaan Ananth, Rohit Thiruvanathil

PRODUCED, DISTRIBUTED & MARKETED BY
Universal Music India and UMG for Brands

Executive Producer: Devraj Sanyal
Chairman & CEO, India & South Asia; SVP Strategy, AMEA (Africa, Middle East, Asia) Universal Music Group

Project & Marketing Head|A&R Lead: Navneet Sodhi
A&R Head: Sajid Maklai
National Creative Head & Showrunner: Prannoy Mathews
Creative Director: Sehar Kaur

Finance: Amita Karia

localized.title: Ae Ajnabee (Official Music Video) - Aditya Rikhari, Ravator, Kutle Khan | Coke Studio Bharat
localized.description:
Coke Studio Bharat Season 4 opens with #AeAjnabee, a melodic journey into the heart of longing. Love may change its language, but that timeless ache for connection remains. Aditya Rikhari's warm vocals meet Kutle Khan's iconic Rajasthani folk sound, all brought together by producer and DJ, Ravator. This track bridges generations; letting the depth of folk breathe within pop's groovy sound. It's for those who remember whispered poetry and those who send late-night texts - a celebration of modern romance rooted in emotion.

Listen to Ae Ajnabee: http://UMGI.lnk.to/AeAjnabee
