 Lyrics: The Chainsmokers - Closer ft. Halsey 

[Verse 1: Andrew Taggart]
Hey, I was doing just fine before I met you
I drink too much
And that's an issue, but I'm okay
Hey, you tell your friends
It was nice to meet them
But I hope I never see them again

[Pre-Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
I know it breaks your heart
Moved to the city in a broke-down car
And four years, no calls
Now you're lookin' pretty in a hotel bar
And I-I-I can't stop
No, I-I-I can't stop

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever getting older

[Post-Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
We ain't ever getting older
We ain't ever getting older

[Verse 2: Halsey]
You look as good as the day I met you
I forget just why I left you, I was insane
Stay and play that blink-182 song
That we beat to death in Tucson, okay

[Pre-Chorus: Halsey]
I know it breaks your heart
Moved to the city in a broke-down car
And four years, no call
Now I'm lookin' pretty in a hotel bar
And I-I-I can't stop
No, I-I-I can't stop

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever getting older

[Post-Chorus: Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
We ain't ever getting older
We ain't ever getting older

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever getting older

[Post-Chorus: Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
We ain't ever getting older
(No, we ain't ever getting older)
We ain't ever getting older
(No, we ain't ever getting older)
We ain't ever getting older

(No, we ain't ever getting older)

snippet.title: Lana Del Rey - Cinnamon Girl (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
#lanadelrey #7clouds #cinnamongirl
Thanks for watching my videos.🖤

Song: Lana Del Rey - Cinnamon Girl (Lyrics)

Follow 

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Cinnamon in my teeth
From your kiss, you're touching me
All the pills that you take
Violet, blue, green, red to keep me at arm's length don't work
You try to push me out, but I just find my way back in
Violet, blue, green, red to keep me out, I win

[Chorus]
There's things I wanna say to you
But I'll just let you live
Like if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did
There's things I wanna talk about
But better not to give
But if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did

[Post-Chorus]
Ah, ah, ah, ah, ah, ah
Hold me, love me, touch me, honey
Be the first who ever did
Ah, ah, ah, ah, ah, ah
Hold me, love me, touch me, honey
Be the first who ever did

[Verse 2]
Kerosene in my hands
You make me mad, on fire again
All the pills that you take
Violet, blue, green, red to keep me at arm's length don't work

[Chorus]
There's things I wanna say to you
But I'll just let you live
Like if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did
There's things I wanna talk about
But better not to give
But if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did

[Post-Chorus]
Ah, ah, ah, ah, ah, ah
Hold me, love me, touch me, honey
Be the first who ever did
Ah, ah, ah, ah, ah, ah
Hold me, love me, touch me, honey
Be the first who ever did

[Chorus]
There's things I wanna say to you
But I'll just let you live
Like if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did
There's things I wanna talk about
But better not to give
Like if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did
.........

“เตือนแล้วนะ” ครบรอบ 10 ปี! จากหนุ่มรักแรกในวันนั้น เตรียมเทสระบบขั้นกว่าในเวอร์ #THIRDLoveWarning2026_MV  🥳⚠️

THIRD - เตือนแล้วนะ (Love Warning) [2026] out now on all platforms!
🚨Official MV: https://youtu.be/vYJL_SOWhMg
🎧Streaming: https://THIRD.lnk.to/LoveWarning2026

#THIRDLoveWarning2026
#ThirdLapat #THIRD
#พั้นรักแมว
#t3group_ent
————————————————————
LYRICS

ยิ่งเจอ ยิ่งลำบาก ลำบากใจทุกที
เห็นเธอต้องแชร์ด่วน แชร์ด่วน กด like ที
มองแล้วมันสั่น ทำหัวใจปั่น ไม่ให้หวั่น ยังไง

ชอบทำมาเป็นหยอด เดี๊ยะ เดี๊ยะโดนกอด
ชอบชวนมาคุยแบบคนรู้ใจ
อยู่ดีก็จ้องตา ชอบคอยส่งยิ้มมา เอ๊ะ เริ่มเกินไป

ก็แบบว่าขอหน่อย เม้นท์หน่อย ชักไม่โอเค
ทำงี้บ่อย งี้บ่อย ฉันเริ่มคาใจ
จะนับหนึ่งถึงหนึ่ง ถ้ายังกวนใจ อย่าโวยกันนะ

ก็บอกแล้วนะ เตือนแล้วนะ เล่นอย่างงี้หัวใจชา
ชอบมาตามองตา ชอบเข้ามาใกล้ชิดกัน
หน้าอย่างงี้ หน้าอย่างงี้ บอกเลยนะ ระวังตัว
ถ้าเอาจริงสักวัน เดี๋ยวหาว่าไม่เตือน

snippet.title: Kaal YT Ko Guild Wapas Di... Fir Usne Mujhe Hi Kick Kar Diya! 😭 Kalam Ka Dil Toot Gaya 💔
snippet.description:
Kaal YT ka guild scam hua tha... bhayi-bahan ne saath milke luta tha. Maine unko wapas bulaya, legal action ki dhamki di – wo dar ke leadership lene ko ready ho gaye! 😱
Lekin Kaal YT mujhse direct baat nahi kar raha – miskunderstanding bahut badi hai. Fir maine Doctor Binda (mera purana dost) ke account pe leadership transfer karwaya, bola: "jaake Kaal YT ko de de, mera naam mat lena!"
Binda gaya, custom match mein le gaya – main bhi gaya, hate comments ka reply diya, 1-2 kill kiye aur jaan bujh kar mar gaya. Fir bhayi-bahan wapas aaye, mafi maangi (maine hi bheja tha). Kaal YT shock ho gaya – usko pata nahi ki sab behind the scene main kar raha tha!
Aakhir mein Binda ne Kaal YT ko guild leadership de di... lekin mujhe kick out kar diya! 💔 Maine Binda ko bola: "thank you bhai, finally Kaal ko sab wapas mil gaya." Fir bhi Binda gussa ho gaya: "tu itna sacrifice kar raha hai, wo tujhe abuse karta hai!"
Ab next video mein Kaal YT ko naya ID gift karne wala hoon – kya wo ab bhi mujhe gaddar samjhega? Full emotional drama dekho!
Like karo, comment mein batao – tum bhi aise dost ke liye sab kuch karoge? Subscribe karo, bell on karo – next part mein gift ID ka scene! 🔥
Tags:
#FreeFire #FreeFireIndia #KaalYT #KalamStory #GuildScam #FFDrama #GuildLeadership #DoctorBinda #FreeFireMax #FFGaming #FreeFireCommunity #FreeFireHighlights #FFScam #FreeFireBooyah #GamingDrama #FreeFireViral #FreeFire2026 #FFShorts #FreeFireSquad #Garena #FreeFireGame #FreeFireLover #FreeFireMemes #FreeFireClips #EmotionalFF #FriendshipDrama
Bas ye daal de – log puri story padh ke video kholenge, emotional ho jayenge! 🔥

Signai, Alfie Rodriguez

Key Grip - Matt Planer
Additional Grip Department - Nate Giordano, Matthew Seesta, Axel Cubias, Cody Ingham, Daniel Kusenda, Jake Condon, Shaun Giordano, Natalie Giordano, Marcial Gonzalez, Bruce Drinnon, Gaither Narron, Isaiah Soto, Blake Danchik, Sean Blair, Erik Covarrubias, Jose Gonzalez

Lyrics:
Take your shoes off
Thank you for dinner baby
I had a really great time
I really loved the conversation
And that your car self drives
The pineapple air freshener
Is my favorite kind
Well this is me but
if you have time
Do you want the house tour?
I could take you to the first, second, third floor
And I promise none of this is a metaphor
I just want you to come inside
Baby what's mine is now yours
The couch is really comfy comfy
Got some Chips Ahoy
If you're hungry hungry
You don't need to love me, love me, love me
I'm just so proud of my design
(to dim the lights)
Do you want the house tour?
I could take you to the first, second, third floor
And I promise none of this is a metaphor
I just want you to come inside
But never enter through the back door
House tour
Yeah, I spent a little fortune on the waxed floors
We can be a little reckless cause it's insured
I'm pleasured to be your hot tour guide
Baby what's mine is now yours
(Oh baby if you come inside, if you come inside
I might let you uh)
My house is on pretty girl avenue
My house was especially built for you
Some say it's a place where your dreams come true
My house
Could be your house too!
So um
Are you coming in or what?

#SabrinaCarpenter #HouseTour #MansBestFriend

अतिरिक्त कैमरा विभाग - एडम हल, जैकब पेरी, कॉनर लैम्बर्ट, सर्जियस तारिक एक्स नाफा, जैक्सन डेविस, जस्टिन ज़ाफिरो, विल हेच्ट, कोगेन एम्ब्री, गाय मैकविकर, गिल्बर्ट अल्वाराडो, सीन डोमेट, कोरी कीफर, डेरिक रोज़, मारियाना वाशचिलेंको

प्रोडक्शन डिज़ाइनर - मिरांडा लोरेंज़
अतिरिक्त कला विभाग - अरिशा वेस्ट, हैली जैकब्स, टीना चरद, सेबेस्टियन इज़े, माइक ज़ेफ्रो, बॉबी स्टीवंस, क्रिस जोन्स, पाइपर रिले, जॉर्ज क्विंटानिला, कैटलिन माव्रोमेट्स, स्टीफन केली, केविन अल्पुचे, डोरियन कैरिलो, डेविड साएंज़ डी माटुराना, जॉर्ज मार्सला, माइकल लोपेज़, अर्नोल्ड कैरास्को, रयान ग्रांट, उमर कैब्रोन, यूरी बोर्डास, पीट फोली, केविन बर्वे

स्टाइलिंग - जेरेड एलनर
दर्जी - केटी केसी
मेकअप विभाग - कैरोलिना गोंजालेज, डायने बुज़ेटा, जेन टियोसेको
हेयर विभाग - इवानी फ्राउस्टो, जैनिन रथ थॉम्पसन, ज़ैकरी मोराड
मैनिक्योरिस्ट - ज़ोला गांजोरिग्ट
कोरियोग्राफर - जैस्मीन “जेबी” बैडी

गैफर - मैथियास पेराल्टा
अतिरिक्त विद्युत विभाग - लुइस “कोआच” कोलाज़ो, जो एस्कैंडेल, जेक कैस्टर, एंडरसन लाउ, पैट्रिक मैट्स, केनी टकर, हार्पर थॉमस, चैंडलर टैंगो, ब्रेंट कीज़, टॉड वार्न, टायलर टैंगो, ब्लेक फार्मर, जस्टिन उसामी, मार्लन ओ'ब्रायन, बॉब शूमेकर, टेडी वेइसफस, नेट ब्राउन, राउल सर्वेंटेस, जेमी डनफोर्ड, मार्शल कूपर, क्रूज़ जिमेनेज़, टी.जे. सिग्नाई, अल्फी रोड्रिगेज़

की ग्रिप - मैट प्लानर
अतिरिक्त ग्रिप विभाग - नेट जियोर्डानो, मैथ्यू सीस्टा, एक्सल क्यूबियास, कोडी इंगम, डैनियल कुसेंडा, जेक कोंडन, शॉन जियोर्डानो, नताली जियोर्डानो, मार्सियल गोंजालेज, ब्रूस ड्रिनन, गैथर नारोन, इसाया सोटो, ब्लेक डैनचिक, सीन ब्लेयर, एरिक कोवरुबियास, जोस गोंजालेज

स्टंट - पैट्रिक रोमानो, पॉल लैकोवारा, गाय फर्नांडीज

कलाकार - ओलिविया प्रुइट, कार्ला गार्सिया, लीह गार्सिया, काइल पॉटर

बोल:
अपने जूते उतार दो
रात के खाने के लिए धन्यवाद बेबी
मुझे बहुत अच्छा लगा
मुझे बातचीत बहुत पसंद आई
और तुम्हारी कार सेल्फ ड्राइव
पाइनएप्पल एयर फ्रेशनर
मेरा पसंदीदा है
खैर, ये मैं हूँ लेकिन
अगर तुम्हारे पास समय हो
तो क्या तुम चाहोगी घर का दौरा?
मैं आपको पहली, दूसरी, तीसरी मंज़िल पर ले जा सकती हूँ
और मैं वादा करती हूँ कि यह सब कोई रूपक नहीं है
मैं बस चाहती हूँ कि आप अंदर आएँ
बेबी, जो मेरा है वह अब तुम्हारा है
सोफा बहुत आरामदायक है
मेरे पास चिप्स अहोय हैं
अगर आपको भूख लगी है
आपको मुझे प्यार करने की ज़रूरत नहीं है
मुझे बस अपने डिज़ाइन पर गर्व है
(रोशनी धीमी करते हुए)
क्या आप घर का दौरा करना चाहती हैं?

मैं तुम्हें पहली, दूसरी, तीसरी मंज़िल तक ले जा सकती हूँ
और मैं वादा करती हूँ कि यह सब कोई रूपक नहीं है
मैं बस चाहती हूँ कि तुम अंदर आओ
लेकिन पीछे के दरवाज़े से कभी मत आना
घर का दौरा
हाँ, मैंने पॉलिश किए हुए फ़र्श पर काफ़ी पैसा खर्च किया है
हम थोड़े बेपरवाह हो सकते हैं क्योंकि इसका बीमा है
मुझे तुम्हारा हॉट टूर गाइड बनकर खुशी हो रही है
बेबी, जो मेरा है वो अब तुम्हारा है
(ओह बेबी, अगर तुम अंदर आओ, अगर तुम अंदर आओ
तो शायद मैं तुम्हें...)
मेरा घर प्रीटी गर्ल एवेन्यू पर है
मेरा घर खास तुम्हारे लिए बना है
कुछ लोग कहते हैं कि यह वो जगह है जहाँ तुम्हारे सपने सच होते हैं
मेरा घर
तुम्हारा घर भी हो सकता है!

तो...
क्या तुम अंदर आ रही हो या नहीं?

#SabrinaCarpenter #HouseTour #MansBestFriend

Letra:
Tire os sapatos
Obrigada pelo jantar, querido
Eu me diverti muito
Adorei a conversa
E que seu carro dirige sozinho
O aromatizador de abacaxi
É o meu favorito
Bem, essa sou eu, mas
se você tiver tempo
Quer um tour pela casa?
Eu poderia te levar ao primeiro, segundo, terceiro andar
E prometo que nada disso é uma metáfora
Só quero que você entre
Amor, o que é meu agora é seu
O sofá é muito confortável
Tem uns Chips Ahoy
Se você estiver com fome
Você não precisa me amar, me amar, me amar
Só estou muito orgulhoso do meu projeto
(para diminuir as luzes)
Quer um tour pela casa?
Eu poderia te levar ao primeiro, segundo, terceiro andar
E prometo que nada disso é uma metáfora
Só quero que você entre
Mas nunca entre pela porta dos fundos
Tour pela casa
É, gastei uma pequena fortuna nos pisos encerados
Podemos ser um pouco imprudentes porque está segurado
Tenho o prazer de ser sua guia turística sensual
Amor, o que é meu agora é seu
(Oh, amor, se você entrar, se você entrar
Eu posso deixar você uh)
Minha casa fica na avenida das garotas bonitas
Minha casa foi construída especialmente para você
Alguns dizem que é um lugar onde seus sonhos se tornam realidade
Minha casa
Poderia ser sua casa também!

Então, hum
Você vai entrar ou não?

Take your shoes off
Thank you for dinner baby
I had a really great time
I really loved the conversation
And that your car self drives
The pineapple air freshener
Is my favorite kind
Well this is me but
if you have time

I just want you to come inside
Baby what's mine is now yours

(to dim the lights)

I just want you to come inside
But never enter through the back door
House tour

My house

So um

Songtext:
Zieh deine Schuhe aus
Danke für das Abendessen, Baby
Ich hatte eine richtig schöne Zeit
Das Gespräch war super
Und dass dein Auto von selbst fährt
Der Ananas-Lufterfrischer
ist mein Lieblingsduft
So, das bin ich, aber
wenn du Zeit hast
Möchtest du eine Hausführung?

Ich könnte dich ins erste, zweite, dritte Stockwerk mitnehmen.
Und ich verspreche dir, das ist keine Metapher.
Ich will nur, dass du reinkommst.
Baby, was mir gehört, gehört jetzt dir.
Die Couch ist so richtig gemütlich.
Ich hab Chips Ahoy.
Wenn du richtig Hunger hast,
du musst mich nicht lieben, lieben, lieben.
Ich bin einfach so stolz auf mein Design.

(Licht dimmen)
Willst du eine Hausführung?

Ich könnte dich ins erste, zweite, dritte Stockwerk mitnehmen.
Und ich verspreche dir, das ist keine Metapher.
Ich möchte einfach, dass du reinkommst.
Aber geh niemals durch die Hintertür.
Hausbesichtigung
Ja, ich habe ein kleines Vermögen für die gewachsten Böden ausgegeben.
Wir können ein bisschen leichtsinnig sein, denn es ist versichert.
Es freut mich, deine heiße Tourguide zu sein.
Baby, was mir gehört, gehört jetzt dir.
(Oh Baby, wenn du reinkommst, wenn du reinkommst, lasse ich dich vielleicht rein.)
Mein Haus liegt in der Straße der hübschen Mädchen.
Mein Haus wurde speziell für dich gebaut.
Man sagt, es ist ein Ort, an dem Träume wahr werden.
Mein Haus
Könnte auch dein Haus sein!

Also ähm
Kommst du rein oder nicht?

#SabrinaCarpenter #HouseTour #MansBestFriend

snippet.title: YABI - TIMI HO
snippet.description:
Written & performed by YABI THE G.O.A.T
Recorded at Kadak Nepali Records
Mixing & Mastering by Ruthlex
 
Get connected

YABI : https://www.instagram.com/yabi_the_g.o.a.t?igsh=MzE0anFmemF0bXV6&utm_source=qr

kADAK NEPALI RECORDS: https://www.instagram.com/kadaknepali?igsh=cDVoNW82NmIxbWY1

Ruthlex: https://www.instagram.com/ruthlexx_np?igsh=OHJ3djdvM3NmcHpz


“Timi Ho”  the 4th track from my mixtape Boomerang is finally here. This song is about real connection, loyalty, and the one person who becomes your strength when everything else feels uncertain. Sometimes in life, no matter how far things go, the right energy always comes back to you like a boomerang.
Thank you to everyone who keeps supporting the journey and believing in the music. This one is from the heart.

“Timi Ho” is now streaming on all platforms.

Lyrics:

[Chorus]
I live my day as if it was the last
Live my day as if there was no past
Doin' it all night, all summer
Doin' it the way I wanna
Yeah, I'ma dance my heart out 'til the dawn
But I won't be done when mornin' comes
Doin' it all night, all summer
Gonna spend it like no other

[Verse 1]
It was a crush
But I couldn't, couldn't get enough
It was a rush
But I gave it up
It was a crush
Now, I might've went and said too much
But that's all it was
So I gave it up

[Chorus]
I live my day as if it was the last
Live my day as if there was no past
Doin' it all night, all summer
Doin' it the way I wanna
Yeah, I'ma dance my heart out 'til the dawn
But I won't be done when mornin' comes
Doin' it all night, all summer
Gonna spend it like no other

[Verse 2]
It was a crush
I kept sayin', "I'ma stay in touch"
But that thing went bust
So I gave it up, ooh
No tricks, no bluff
I'm just better off without them cuffs
Yeah, the sun won't set on us
Ooh, ooh, ooh, yeah, yeah

[Pre-Chorus]
Went low, went high
Still waters run dry
Gotta get back in the groove
I ain't ever worried
Went low, went high
What matters is now
Gettin' right back in the mood

[Chorus]
I live my day as if it was the last
Live my day as if there was no past
Doin' it all night, all summer
Doin' it the way I wanna
Yeah, I'ma dance my heart out 'til the dawn
But I won't be done when mornin' comes
Doin' it all night, all summer
Gonna spend it like no other

[Post-Chorus]
Now I've found another crush
The lush life's given me a rush
Had one chance to make me blush
Second time is one too late

The lush life's given me a rush
Had one chance to make me blush
Second time is one too late

Ooh, ooh-woah

Doin' it all night, all summer

But I won't be done when mornin' comes

Gonna spend it like no other

snippet.title: Tere Bin - Aviverse | ‪‪@astheticavi  |‪‪ @MeAbhishekShukla  (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/0H2nWnDwx85PuU7f6gKima?si=f7424035e6694af0

Listen on Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/album/tere-bin-single/1877448559

"Tere Bin" is not just a song, it’s a feeling of losing someone you thought was yours forever.

This is a story of love, betrayal, and heartbreak…
When the girl you loved the most chooses someone else, and you’re left behind with memories that refuse to fade.

Every line of this song carries the pain of unanswered questions, broken promises, and the silence after goodbye.

If you’ve ever loved someone truly and lost them… this song will hit you differently.

Credits:

Song Name : Tere Bin
Vocals : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Lyrics : Abhishek Shukla & Avinash Kumar
Composed by : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Producer: Avinash Kumar
Music Producer : Abs
Edited By : Ash Studio
Artwork By : Junaid

Stream On Aviverse Spotify -

https://open.spotify.com/artist/0HTZXytA3dhUpgTADrDn9O

Aviverse's Instagram - https://instagram.com/aviversemusic
Abhishek's Instagram - https://instagram.com/abhishekxavi
Avinash's Instagram - https://instagram.com/aesthetic_avii

lyrics :

तेरे बिन जीना बेकार होवे यार सजनी,
अब भी करता हूँ तेरा इंतज़ार सजनी,
तेरे बिन जीना बेकार होवे यार सजनी,
अब भी होती ना तेरे बिन रात सजनी।

आँखें हैं नम, यादों में तेरी,
अश्कों से मेरे शहर बन गए,
पत्थर ये दिल, धड़कता ना मेरा,
दर्द तेरे ज़ख्म बन गए।

भीगा ये तकिया मेरा खारे पानी से,
जबसे किरदार हुआ है खत्म कहानी से,
आजा वे माही, तेरा रास्ता तकूँ,
तू सुनती नहीं, मैं कहता रहूँ।

तेरे बिन जीना बेकार होवे यार सजनी,
अब भी करता हूँ तेरा इंतज़ार सजनी,
तेरे बिन जीना बेकार होवे यार सजनी,
अब भी होती ना तेरे बिन रात सजनी।

दिल हारा, दिल हारा मैं तेरे लिए,
बैठा मैं बंजारा सिर्फ तेरे लिए,
तेरा दीदार होया मैनू सनम,
बैठा तू गैर नाल, ना आई शर्म।

मेरे पन्ने भी ना खत्म हो रहे,
मेरी स्याही के तुम नज़्म बन गए,
तेरी महक में हम फ़ना हैं सनम, क्यों
मेरा गुलाब तुम दफ़न कर गए।

आजा तू फिर से हम बात करें,
तेरे होंठों से अपना नाम सुनें,
हम तो जाना बेजान थे,
लेके बाहों में आप साँसें बने।

तेरे बिन जीना बेकार होवे यार सजनी,
अब भी करता हूँ तेरा इंतज़ार सजनी,
तेरे बिन जीना बेकार होवे यार सजनी,
अब भी होती ना तेरे बिन रात सजनी।

snippet.title: आ अब लौट चलें | Aa Ab Laut Chalen | Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan Songs | Aishwarya Rai
snippet.description:
प्यार और भावनाओं से भरी आवाज़ें, Alka Yagnik और Udit Narayan की! सुनिए फिल्म 'Aa Ab Laut Chalen' का ये खूबसूरत गाना और खो जाइये 90s के रोमांटिक दौर में। इस गाने में प्यार की गहराई और मधुरता है जो सीधे दिल को छू जाती है। 1999 के इस गाने को सुनकर आप पुराने दिनों की यादों में खो जाएंगे। ये गाना उन सभी प्रेमियों के लिए है जो अपने प्यार को शब्दों में बयां नहीं कर पाते।



Credits :

Song: Aa Ab Laut Chalen
Album: Aa Ab Laut Chalen
Artist: Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters REMATCH
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters REMATCH. You asked for it. This was absolutely INSANE.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames 
George:  @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap:  @Sapnap 
Antfrost:  @Antfrost 
awesamdude:  @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

এই ভিডিওতে যদি ৫০০,০০০ লাইক পড়ে, তবে আমরা আবারও একটি রিম্যাচ করবো!
